1: # PantryPal Hackathon Plan (8 Hours)
2: 
3: This is the master coordination board for a short demo build.
4: 
5: ## Demo Goal
6: 
7: Ship a working end-to-end flow where a user can:
8: 1. Sign up/login.
9: 2. Set body metrics, food preferences, and monthly budget.
10: 3. Generate a daily/weekly meal plan with AI.
11: 4. View meals in a calendar-style UI with macros and ingredient quantities.
12: 5. Accept a generated plan and store it.
13: 6. Manage pantry items and mark meals as consumed to auto-deduct pantry stock.
14: 
15: ## Scope Guardrails (Hackathon)
16: 
17: - Prioritize **working happy paths** over edge-case completeness.
18: - Build daily + weekly plan first; monthly can reuse same pipeline.
19: - Keep auth simple (email/password + session/JWT).
20: - Use SQLite locally; no production deployment requirements.
21: - Cost values can come from AI output for demo purposes.
22: 
23: ## Priorities
24: 
25: - `P0` = must have for demo.
26: - `P1` = strong add if time permits.
27: - `P2` = optional stretch.
28: 
29: ## Master Task Order
30: 
31: ### Phase 0 - Project setup (0:00-0:30)
32: 
33: - [ ] `P0` Confirm repo structure and ownership for sessions:
34:   - `/tasks/TASKS.md` (this file)
35:   - `/tasks/pm.md`
36:   - `/tasks/backend.md`
37:   - `/tasks/frontend.md`
38:   - `/tasks/ai.md`
39:   - `/tasks/bugs.md`
40: - [ ] `P0` Define API contract skeleton (auth, profile, pantry, plans, chat).
41: - [ ] `P0` Define auth/security minimums (password hashing, token expiry).
42: - [ ] `P0` Decide timebox checkpoints at 2h / 4h / 6h / 8h.
43: 
44: ### Phase 1 - Data model and auth foundation (0:30-2:00)
45: 
46: - [ ] `P0` Create SQLite schema + migrations for:
47:   - users
48:   - user_preferences
49:   - user_body_metrics
50:   - budgets / purchases
51:   - ingredients (seed dataset)
52:   - recipes + recipe_ingredients
53:   - pantry_items
54:   - meal_plans (day/week/month)
55:   - plan_meals
56:   - consumption_log
57:   - chat_messages
58: - [ ] `P0` Provide one-command DB setup/reset for all sessions.
59: - [ ] `P0` Seed ingredient data (fake seed acceptable).
60: - [ ] `P0` Implement auth endpoints:
61:   - register
62:   - login
63:   - current user (`/me`)
64: - [ ] `P0` Implement profile endpoints to read/update:
65:   - body metrics

67:   - monthly budget
68: - [ ] `P0` Freeze API v1 contract at 2h mark so frontend/AI can continue in parallel.
69: 
70: ### Phase 2 - Pantry + recipes + macros pipeline (2:00-3:30)
71: 
72: - [ ] `P0` Pantry endpoints:
73:   - search ingredients
74:   - add item with quantity
75:   - remove item / decrement quantity
76: - [ ] `P0` Recipe read endpoints with ingredients + macros.
77: - [ ] `P0` Macro aggregation service:
78:   - per meal
79:   - per day
80:   - per week
81: - [ ] `P1` Budget tracking endpoint for purchases and current monthly spend.
82: 
83: ### Phase 3 - AI meal plan generation and acceptance (3:30-5:30)
84: 
85: - [ ] `P0` Integrate Gemini API service wrapper.
86: - [ ] `P0` Add fallback generator (seeded/canned plan) if Gemini is unavailable.
87: - [ ] `P0` Chat endpoint with actions:
88:   - request meal
89:   - request day plan
90:   - request week plan
91:   - request month plan
92: - [ ] `P0` Normalize AI output into internal plan format:
93:   - day split into 4 sections (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
94:   - ingredient names mapped to DB ingredients
95:   - quantities, macros, and AI-provided cost captured
96: - [ ] `P0` Accept/decline flow:
97:   - decline => regenerate proposal
98:   - accept => persist to meal_plans + plan_meals
99: - [ ] `P1` Add favorite action (store proposal without scheduling).
100: - [ ] `P1` Decide chat retention for demo (store full messages vs summary metadata).
101: 
102: ### Phase 4 - Frontend demo flows (5:30-7:00)
103: 
104: - [ ] `P0` Vanilla JS auth screens (register/login/logout).
105: - [ ] `P0` Profile screen for metrics, preferences, budget editing.
106: - [ ] `P0` Calendar-like weekly view with:
107:   - 7 days
108:   - 4 meal sections/day
109:   - total macros/day and week
110: - [ ] `P0` Pantry management UI:
111:   - ingredient search
112:   - add/remove quantity
113: - [ ] `P0` Chat interface with action buttons:
114:   - create meal
115:   - create day plan
116:   - create week plan
117:   - create month plan
118:   - accept / decline
119: - [ ] `P0` Mark meal consumed action triggers pantry deduction.
120: 
121: ### Phase 5 - Stabilize, test, and demo prep (7:00-8:00)
122: 
123: - [ ] `P0` End-to-end happy-path test script:
124:   - sign up
125:   - set profile
126:   - generate week plan

135: - [ ] `P2` Optional: supermarket list from pantry gaps.
136: 
137: ## Definition of Done for Demo

140: - User can generate and accept a weekly plan from chat.
141: - Weekly view shows meals and macro totals.
142: - Pantry can be edited manually and auto-deducts on meal consumption.
143: - System runs locally with SQLite and seeded data.
144: 
145: ## Session Ownership Map
146: 
147: - Session A (Product Manager): roadmap, priorities, specs, integration coordination.
148: - Session B (Backend): DB schema, auth, pantry, plans, macros, consumption logic.
149: - Session C (Frontend): auth/profile UI, calendar views, pantry UI, chat UI.
150: - Session D (AI/RAG): Gemini integration, prompt format, output normalization, ingredient matching.
151: - Session E (QA): test checklist, bug triage, regression pass before demo.
152: 
153: ## Handoff Notes for Next Step
154: 
155: Next files to generate from this master:
156: - `/tasks/pm.md`
157: - `/tasks/backend.md`
158: - `/tasks/frontend.md`
159: - `/tasks/ai.md`
160: - `/tasks/bugs.md`
161: 
162: Each file should include:
163: - owner
164: - objective
165: - ordered task list
166: - API/UI contracts needed from others
167: - risk list
168: - done criteria

(End of file - total 168 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# PantryPal Hackathon Plan (8 Hours)

This is the master coordination board for a short demo build.

## Demo Goal

Ship a working end-to-end flow where a user can:
1. Sign up/login.
2. Set body metrics, food preferences, and monthly budget.
3. Generate a daily/weekly meal plan with AI.
4. View meals in a calendar-style UI with macros and ingredient quantities.
5. Accept a generated plan and store it.
6. Manage pantry items and mark meals as consumed to auto-deduct pantry stock.

## Scope Guardrails (Hackathon)

- Prioritize **working happy paths** over edge-case completeness.
- Build daily + weekly plan first; monthly can reuse same pipeline.
- Keep auth simple (email/password + session/JWT).
- Use SQLite locally; no production deployment requirements.

1: # Session B - Backend Tasks
2: 
3: ## Owner
4: 
5: - Backend Engineer (Go API + SQLite)
6: 
7: ## Objective
8: 
9: - Deliver stable API and data layer for auth, profile, pantry, meal plans, macros, and consumption flows.
10: 
11: ## Ordered Task List
12: 
13: ### 1) Schema and setup first (0:30-1:30)
14: 
15: - [ ] `P0` Implement SQLite schema + migrations for:
16:   - users
17:   - user_body_metrics
18:   - user_preferences
19:   - budgets
20:   - purchases
21:   - ingredients
22:   - recipes
23:   - recipe_ingredients
24:   - pantry_items
25:   - meal_plans
26:   - plan_meals
27:   - consumption_log
28:   - chat_messages
29:   - favorites (optional table behind feature flag/time)
30: - [ ] `P0` Add one-command local DB setup/reset path.
31: - [ ] `P0` Seed ingredients and minimal recipes for deterministic demo.
32: 
33: ### 2) Auth and profile APIs (1:30-2:30)
34: 
35: - [ ] `P0` Auth endpoints: `POST /auth/register`, `POST /auth/login`, `GET /me`.
36: - [ ] `P0` Password hashing and token/session expiry rules.
37: - [ ] `P0` Profile endpoints for metrics, preferences, budget:
38:   - `GET /profile`
39:   - `PATCH /profile/metrics`
40:   - `PATCH /profile/preferences`
41:   - `PATCH /profile/budget`
42: - [ ] `P0` Publish API v1 examples for frontend and AI sessions.
43: 
44: ### 3) Pantry and recipes APIs (2:30-3:30)
45: 
46: - [ ] `P0` `GET /ingredients/search?q=` for pantry add flow.
47: - [ ] `P0` `POST /pantry/items` (ingredient + quantity + unit).
48: - [ ] `P0` `PATCH /pantry/items/:id` (increment/decrement quantity).
49: - [ ] `P0` `DELETE /pantry/items/:id`.
50: - [ ] `P0` `GET /recipes/:id` with ingredient quantities and macros.
51: - [ ] `P1` Purchases endpoints for budget tracking:
52:   - `POST /purchases`
53:   - `GET /budget/summary`
54: 
55: ### 4) Plan persistence and macro aggregation (3:30-5:00)
56: 
57: - [ ] `P0` `POST /plans/proposal` ingestion endpoint for AI-normalized payload.
58: - [ ] `P0` `POST /plans/:id/accept` persists to meal plans.
59: - [ ] `P0` `POST /plans/:id/decline` archives/rejects and supports regeneration flow.
60: - [ ] `P0` `GET /plans/week?start=` returns 7-day calendar payload.
61: - [ ] `P0` Macro totals service in responses:
62:   - per meal
63:   - per day
64:   - per week
65: 
66: ### 5) Consumption and pantry deduction (5:00-6:00)
67: 
68: - [ ] `P0` `POST /plan-meals/:id/consume` marks consumed with timestamp.
69: - [ ] `P0` Deduct pantry ingredients by recipe quantities.
70: - [ ] `P0` Prevent negative pantry values (clamp at zero + warning field).
71: - [ ] `P0` Log deductions to `consumption_log` for audit/debug.
72: 
73: ### 6) Hardening for demo (6:00-7:00)
74: 
75: - [ ] `P0` Add consistent error format for frontend handling.
76: - [ ] `P0` Add lightweight request logging and key action tracing.
77: - [ ] `P0` Add smoke checks for auth -> plan accept -> consume flow.
78: - [ ] `P1` Add favorite proposal endpoint if time remains.
79: 
80: ## Contracts Needed From Others
81: 
82: - PM: frozen priority and final scope boundaries.
83: - AI: normalized proposal JSON schema and ingredient matching policy.
84: - Frontend: required response fields per screen.
85: - QA: top-priority test scenarios and failure expectations.
86: 
87: ## Risks
88: 
89: - AI names not matching ingredient table.
90: - Unit mismatches (g/ml/piece) creating deduction inaccuracies.
91: - Time overrun from building too many endpoints before core path is stable.
92: 
93: ## Done Criteria
94: 
95: - API supports full happy path from auth to pantry auto-deduction.
96: - Weekly plan endpoint returns 7-day, 4-section layout with macro totals.
97: - DB setup/seed is reproducible in one command.
98: - Frontend can run without backend contract guesswork.

(End of file - total 98 lines)
</content>

31:   - estimated cost

43:

45: - [ ] `P0` Return unmatched ingredients list for backend/UI warnings.
46: - [ ] `P0` Reconcile macro totals per meal/day/week in normalized output.

49: ### 5) Accept/decline and fallback mode (5:30-6:30)
50:

72: - Ingredient mismatch rates too high for pantry deduction.
73: - API rate limits/latency impacting live demo.
74: 
75: ## Done Criteria

78: - Plans generate for meal/day/week/month requests with 4 sections/day.
79: - Ingredient mapping returns canonical IDs or explicit unmatched list.
80: - Fallback generator can replace Gemini without breaking the demo path.

(End of file - total 80 lines)
</content>

7: ## Objective
8: 
9: - Keep the 8-hour demo focused on a working end-to-end flow.
10: - Lock scope quickly, unblock cross-session dependencies, and manage risk/time.
11: 
12: ## Ordered Task List
13: 
14: ### 0) Kickoff and scope lock (0:00-0:30)
15: 
16: - [ ] `P0` Confirm demo storyline: signup -> profile setup -> generate week plan -> accept -> pantry update -> consume meal.
17: - [ ] `P0` Confirm out-of-scope items for this sprint (full optimization, advanced settings, heavy polish).
18: - [ ] `P0` Assign session owners and communication cadence (check-ins at 2h/4h/6h/8h).
19: - [ ] `P0` Create shared decision log with timestamps and owner.
20: 
21: ### 1) Spec freeze for parallel work (0:30-2:00)
22: 
23: - [ ] `P0` Freeze API v1 contract by 2h mark.
24: - [ ] `P0` Freeze AI response shape v1 (meals/day split, ingredient fields, macros, cost).
25: - [ ] `P0` Freeze frontend MVP screens and navigation map.
26: - [ ] `P0` Define acceptance rules for plan proposal (accept, decline/regenerate, favorite optional).
27: 
28: ### 2) Integration management (2:00-6:30)
29: 
30: - [ ] `P0` Resolve cross-team blockers in <=15 minutes each.
31: - [ ] `P0` Verify backend/frontend contract alignment after every major endpoint.
32: - [ ] `P0` Verify AI ingredient matching strategy and fallback behavior.
33: - [ ] `P1` Keep release notes updated with what is demo-ready vs partially complete.
34: 
35: ### 3) Demo readiness (6:30-8:00)
36: 
37: - [ ] `P0` Run full walkthrough with QA observer.
38: - [ ] `P0` Prepare demo script with exact clicks and API actions.
39: - [ ] `P0` Mark risks and fallback moves for each step (especially AI outage).
40: - [ ] `P0` Final go/no-go checklist with owners for each section.
41: 
42: ## Contracts Needed From Others
43: 
44: - Backend: stable endpoint list, payload examples, migration/setup command.
45: - Frontend: final routes/screens and expected loading/error states.
46: - AI: prompt template, JSON schema, fallback plan output format.
47: - QA: final bug severity rubric and test checklist coverage.
48: 
49: ## Risks
50: 
51: - API contract drift after 2h causing rework.
52: - AI output variability breaking parser.
53: - Pantry deduction logic unclear at edge cases.
54: - Time spent on optional features reducing demo stability.
55: 
56: ## Done Criteria
57: 
58: - API and AI contracts are frozen and shared.
59: - End-to-end demo script passes at least once without manual DB edits.
60: - Each session has explicit must-have vs nice-to-have status.
61: - Fallback demo path exists if AI service fails.

(End of file - total 61 lines)
</content>

# Session A - Product Manager Tasks

## Owner

- Product Manager / Integration Lead

## Objective

- Keep the 8-hour demo focused on a working end-to-end flow.
- Lock scope quickly, unblock cross-session dependencies, and manage risk/time.

## Ordered Task List

### 0) Kickoff and scope lock (0:00-0:30)

- [ ] `P0` Confirm demo storyline: signup -> profile setup -> generate week plan -> accept -> pantry update -> consume meal.
- [ ] `P0` Confirm out-of-scope items for this sprint (full optimization, advanced settings, heavy polish).
- [ ] `P0` Assign session owners and communication cadence (check-ins at 2h/4h/6h/8h).
- [ ] `P0` Create shared decision log with timestamps and owner.

parts.text:
Great - I reviewed all of `tasks/` and I’ll take **Session B (Backend)**.

Backend ownership is clear in `tasks/backend.md`: schema/migrations, auth/profile, pantry, plans/macros, and consumption deduction, with the demo-critical happy path first.

**Backend game plan**
- **Phase 1 (P0 first):** DB schema + migrations + deterministic seed + one-command reset (`users`, `preferences`, `metrics`, `ingredients`, `recipes`, `pantry`, `plans`, `plan_meals`, `consumption_log`, `chat_messages`).
- **Phase 2:** Auth/profile contract lock: `POST /auth/register`, `POST /auth/login`, `GET /me`, `GET /profile`, `PATCH /profile/metrics`, `PATCH /profile/preferences`, `PATCH /profile/budget`.
- **Phase 3:** Pantry/recipe flow: `GET /ingredients/search`, `POST/PATCH/DELETE /pantry/items`, `GET /recipes/:id`.
- **Phase 4:** Proposal + persistence: `POST /plans/proposal`, `POST /plans/:id/accept`, `POST /plans/:id/decline`, `GET /plans/week?start=`.
- **Phase 5:** Consumption logic: `POST /plan-meals/:id/consume` with pantry deduction, clamp-at-zero guard, and `consumption_log` writes.
- **Phase 6:** Hardening for frontend/QA: consistent error envelope, lightweight request/action logging, smoke path (auth -> accept plan -> consume).

**Contract freeze focus (2h mark)**
- Freeze request/response shapes early so frontend + AI can continue in parallel.
- Require AI normalized payload to include canonical ingredient mapping + unmatched list.
- Keep budget/purchases and favorites behind time-available gates (`P1`).

**Main risk controls**
- Ingredient mismatch: backend accepts unmatched list and surfaces warnings instead of failing full flow.
- Unit mismatch: canonical unit strategy + conservative deduction rules.
- Time risk: no stretch endpoints until weekly happy path is fully green.

If you want, next step I’ll do a quick read-only repo audit and map this plan to actual backend files/routes so we can start implementation in strict priority order.

diffs.patch:
Index: backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql
===================================================================
--- backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql	
+++ backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql	
@@ -0,0 +1,206 @@
+PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
+    display_name TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_body_metrics (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    height_cm REAL,
+    weight_kg REAL,
+    age INTEGER,
+    sex TEXT,
+    activity_level TEXT,
+    goal TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    CHECK (sex IN ('female', 'male', 'other', 'prefer_not_to_say') OR sex IS NULL)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_preferences (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    diet_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'omnivore',
+    allergies_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    dislikes_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    likes_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    daily_calorie_target INTEGER,
+    notes TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS budgets (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    month TEXT NOT NULL,
+    currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
+    amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (amount_cents >= 0),
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    UNIQUE (user_id, month)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingredients (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    canonical_unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    kcal_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    protein_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    carbs_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    fat_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents_per_unit INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchases (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    budget_id TEXT,
+    ingredient_id TEXT,
+    description TEXT,
+    quantity REAL,
+    unit TEXT,
+    cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (cost_cents >= 0),
+    purchased_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (budget_id) REFERENCES budgets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    meal_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    servings INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (servings > 0),
+    instructions TEXT,
+    total_kcal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_protein_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_carbs_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_fat_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    CHECK (meal_type IN ('breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks'))
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipe_ingredients (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
+    UNIQUE (recipe_id, ingredient_id, unit)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry_items (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
+    UNIQUE (user_id, ingredient_id, unit)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meal_plans (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    period_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    start_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    end_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'accepted',
+    source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ai',
+    proposal_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+    ai_cost_cents_total INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (ai_cost_cents_total >= 0),
+    notes TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    CHECK (period_type IN ('day', 'week', 'month')),
+    CHECK (status IN ('proposal', 'accepted', 'declined', 'archived')),
+    CHECK (source IN ('ai', 'fallback', 'manual')),
+    CHECK (start_date <= end_date)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plan_meals (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    meal_plan_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    recipe_id TEXT,
+    scheduled_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    meal_section TEXT NOT NULL,
+    recipe_name TEXT NOT NULL,
+    servings REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (servings > 0),
+    kcal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    protein_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    carbs_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    fat_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    is_consumed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (is_consumed IN (0, 1)),
+    consumed_at DATETIME,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (meal_plan_id) REFERENCES meal_plans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    CHECK (meal_section IN ('breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks')),
+    UNIQUE (meal_plan_id, scheduled_date, meal_section)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumption_log (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    plan_meal_id TEXT,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT,
+    pantry_item_id TEXT,
+    quantity_deducted REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity_deducted >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    before_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (before_quantity >= 0),
+    after_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (after_quantity >= 0),
+    warning TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (plan_meal_id) REFERENCES plan_meals(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (pantry_item_id) REFERENCES pantry_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_messages (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    meal_plan_id TEXT,
+    role TEXT NOT NULL,
+    action TEXT,
+    content TEXT NOT NULL,
+    metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (meal_plan_id) REFERENCES meal_plans(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    CHECK (role IN ('system', 'user', 'assistant', 'tool'))
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON users(email);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ingredients_name ON ingredients(name);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_items_user_id ON pantry_items(user_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_items_ingredient_id ON pantry_items(ingredient_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_meal_plans_user_period ON meal_plans(user_id, period_type, start_date);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plan_meals_meal_plan_id ON plan_meals(meal_plan_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plan_meals_schedule ON plan_meals(scheduled_date, meal_section);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_consumption_log_user_created_at ON consumption_log(user_id, created_at);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chat_messages_user_created_at ON chat_messages(user_id, created_at);

Index: docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md
===================================================================
--- docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md	
+++ docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+# Backend DB Setup
+
+Local SQLite setup for backend Phase 1 tasks.
+
+## One-command reset
+
+Run from repo root:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/reset-local-db
+```
+
+This will:
+- Recreate `database/sqlite/pantrypal.db`
+- Apply `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`
+- Seed demo data from `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`
+
+## Optional commands
+
+Create DB only if missing:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh setup
+```
+
+Force recreate DB:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```
+
+Override DB file path:
+
+```bash
+DB_PATH=/tmp/pantrypal-demo.db ./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```

Index: scripts/db/local_db.sh
===================================================================
--- scripts/db/local_db.sh	
+++ scripts/db/local_db.sh	
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
+DB_PATH="${DB_PATH:-$ROOT_DIR/database/sqlite/pantrypal.db}"
+MIGRATION_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql"
+SEED_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql"
+MODE="${1:-reset}"
+
+if [[ ! -f "$MIGRATION_PATH" ]]; then
+  printf "Missing migration file: %s\n" "$MIGRATION_PATH" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ ! -f "$SEED_PATH" ]]; then
+  printf "Missing seed file: %s\n" "$SEED_PATH" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB_PATH")"
+
+case "$MODE" in
+  setup)
+    if [[ -f "$DB_PATH" ]]; then
+      printf "Database already exists: %s\n" "$DB_PATH"
+      printf "Use '%s reset' to recreate it.\n" "$0"
+      exit 0
+    fi
+    ;;
+  reset)
+    rm -f "$DB_PATH"
+    ;;
+  *)
+    printf "Usage: %s [setup|reset]\n" "$0" >&2
+    exit 1
+    ;;
+esac
+
+sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$MIGRATION_PATH"
+sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$SEED_PATH"
+
+printf "Database ready at %s\n" "$DB_PATH"

Index: scripts/db/reset-local-db
===================================================================
--- scripts/db/reset-local-db	
+++ scripts/db/reset-local-db	
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+"$SCRIPT_DIR/local_db.sh" reset

input.patchText:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql
+PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
+    display_name TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_body_metrics (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    height_cm REAL,
+    weight_kg REAL,
+    age INTEGER,
+    sex TEXT,
+    activity_level TEXT,
+    goal TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    CHECK (sex IN ('female', 'male', 'other', 'prefer_not_to_say') OR sex IS NULL)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_preferences (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    diet_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'omnivore',
+    allergies_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    dislikes_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    likes_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    daily_calorie_target INTEGER,
+    notes TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS budgets (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    month TEXT NOT NULL,
+    currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
+    amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (amount_cents >= 0),
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    UNIQUE (user_id, month)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingredients (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    canonical_unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    kcal_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    protein_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    carbs_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    fat_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents_per_unit INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchases (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    budget_id TEXT,
+    ingredient_id TEXT,
+    description TEXT,
+    quantity REAL,
+    unit TEXT,
+    cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (cost_cents >= 0),
+    purchased_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (budget_id) REFERENCES budgets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    meal_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    servings INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (servings > 0),
+    instructions TEXT,
+    total_kcal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_protein_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_carbs_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_fat_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    CHECK (meal_type IN ('breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks'))
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipe_ingredients (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
+    UNIQUE (recipe_id, ingredient_id, unit)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry_items (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
+    UNIQUE (user_id, ingredient_id, unit)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meal_plans (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    period_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    start_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    end_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'accepted',
+    source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ai',
+    proposal_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+    ai_cost_cents_total INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (ai_cost_cents_total >= 0),
+    notes TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    CHECK (period_type IN ('day', 'week', 'month')),
+    CHECK (status IN ('proposal', 'accepted', 'declined', 'archived')),
+    CHECK (source IN ('ai', 'fallback', 'manual')),
+    CHECK (start_date <= end_date)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plan_meals (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    meal_plan_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    recipe_id TEXT,
+    scheduled_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    meal_section TEXT NOT NULL,
+    recipe_name TEXT NOT NULL,
+    servings REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (servings > 0),
+    kcal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    protein_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    carbs_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    fat_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    is_consumed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (is_consumed IN (0, 1)),
+    consumed_at DATETIME,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (meal_plan_id) REFERENCES meal_plans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    CHECK (meal_section IN ('breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks')),
+    UNIQUE (meal_plan_id, scheduled_date, meal_section)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumption_log (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    plan_meal_id TEXT,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT,
+    pantry_item_id TEXT,
+    quantity_deducted REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity_deducted >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    before_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (before_quantity >= 0),
+    after_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (after_quantity >= 0),
+    warning TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (plan_meal_id) REFERENCES plan_meals(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (pantry_item_id) REFERENCES pantry_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_messages (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    meal_plan_id TEXT,
+    role TEXT NOT NULL,
+    action TEXT,
+    content TEXT NOT NULL,
+    metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (meal_plan_id) REFERENCES meal_plans(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    CHECK (role IN ('system', 'user', 'assistant', 'tool'))
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON users(email);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ingredients_name ON ingredients(name);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_items_user_id ON pantry_items(user_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_items_ingredient_id ON pantry_items(ingredient_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_meal_plans_user_period ON meal_plans(user_id, period_type, start_date);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plan_meals_meal_plan_id ON plan_meals(meal_plan_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plan_meals_schedule ON plan_meals(scheduled_date, meal_section);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_consumption_log_user_created_at ON consumption_log(user_id, created_at);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chat_messages_user_created_at ON chat_messages(user_id, created_at);
*** End Patch

+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

+    CHECK (sex IN ('female', 'male', 'other', 'prefer_not_to_say') OR sex IS NULL)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_preferences (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    diet_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'omnivore',
+    allergies_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    dislikes_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    likes_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
+    daily_calorie_target INTEGER,
+    notes TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS budgets (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    month TEXT NOT NULL,
+    currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
+    amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (amount_cents >= 0),
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    UNIQUE (user_id, month)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingredients (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    canonical_unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    kcal_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    protein_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    carbs_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    fat_g_per_unit REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents_per_unit INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchases (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    budget_id TEXT,
+    ingredient_id TEXT,
+    description TEXT,
+    quantity REAL,
+    unit TEXT,
+    cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (cost_cents >= 0),
+    purchased_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (budget_id) REFERENCES budgets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    meal_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    servings INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (servings > 0),
+    instructions TEXT,
+    total_kcal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_protein_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_carbs_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    total_fat_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    CHECK (meal_type IN ('breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks'))
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipe_ingredients (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
+    UNIQUE (recipe_id, ingredient_id, unit)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry_items (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
+    UNIQUE (user_id, ingredient_id, unit)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meal_plans (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    period_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    start_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    end_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'accepted',
+    source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ai',
+    proposal_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+    ai_cost_cents_total INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (ai_cost_cents_total >= 0),
+    notes TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    CHECK (period_type IN ('day', 'week', 'month')),
+    CHECK (status IN ('proposal', 'accepted', 'declined', 'archived')),
+    CHECK (source IN ('ai', 'fallback', 'manual')),
+    CHECK (start_date <= end_date)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plan_meals (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    meal_plan_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    recipe_id TEXT,
+    scheduled_date DATE NOT NULL,
+    meal_section TEXT NOT NULL,
+    recipe_name TEXT NOT NULL,
+    servings REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (servings > 0),
+    kcal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    protein_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    carbs_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    fat_g REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    estimated_cost_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    is_consumed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (is_consumed IN (0, 1)),
+    consumed_at DATETIME,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (meal_plan_id) REFERENCES meal_plans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    CHECK (meal_section IN ('breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks')),
+    UNIQUE (meal_plan_id, scheduled_date, meal_section)
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumption_log (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    plan_meal_id TEXT,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    ingredient_id TEXT,
+    pantry_item_id TEXT,
+    quantity_deducted REAL NOT NULL CHECK (quantity_deducted >= 0),
+    unit TEXT NOT NULL,
+    before_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (before_quantity >= 0),
+    after_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (after_quantity >= 0),
+    warning TEXT,
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (plan_meal_id) REFERENCES plan_meals(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY (pantry_item_id) REFERENCES pantry_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
+);
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_messages (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    meal_plan_id TEXT,
+    role TEXT NOT NULL,
+    action TEXT,
+    content TEXT NOT NULL,
+    metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
+    created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY (meal_plan_id) REFERENCES meal_plans(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
+    CHECK (role IN ('system', 'user', 'assistant', 'tool'))
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON users(email);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ingredients_name ON ingredients(name);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_items_user_id ON pantry_items(user_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_items_ingredient_id ON pantry_items(ingredient_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_meal_plans_user_period ON meal_plans(user_id, period_type, start_date);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plan_meals_meal_plan_id ON plan_meals(meal_plan_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plan_meals_schedule ON plan_meals(scheduled_date, meal_section);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_consumption_log_user_created_at ON consumption_log(user_id, created_at);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chat_messages_user_created_at ON chat_messages(user_id, created_at);

input.patchText:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/scripts/db/local_db.sh
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
+DB_PATH="${DB_PATH:-$ROOT_DIR/database/sqlite/pantrypal.db}"
+MIGRATION_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql"
+SEED_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql"
+MODE="${1:-reset}"
+
+if [[ ! -f "$MIGRATION_PATH" ]]; then
+  printf "Missing migration file: %s\n" "$MIGRATION_PATH" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ ! -f "$SEED_PATH" ]]; then
+  printf "Missing seed file: %s\n" "$SEED_PATH" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB_PATH")"
+
+case "$MODE" in
+  setup)
+    if [[ -f "$DB_PATH" ]]; then
+      printf "Database already exists: %s\n" "$DB_PATH"
+      printf "Use '%s reset' to recreate it.\n" "$0"
+      exit 0
+    fi
+    ;;
+  reset)
+    rm -f "$DB_PATH"
+    ;;
+  *)
+    printf "Usage: %s [setup|reset]\n" "$0" >&2
+    exit 1
+    ;;
+esac
+
+sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$MIGRATION_PATH"
+sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$SEED_PATH"
+
+printf "Database ready at %s\n" "$DB_PATH"
*** End Patch

input.patchText:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md
+# Backend DB Setup
+
+Local SQLite setup for backend Phase 1 tasks.
+
+## One-command reset
+
+Run from repo root:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/reset-local-db
+```
+
+This will:
+- Recreate `database/sqlite/pantrypal.db`
+- Apply `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`
+- Seed demo data from `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`
+
+## Optional commands
+
+Create DB only if missing:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh setup
+```
+
+Force recreate DB:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```
+
+Override DB file path:
+
+```bash
+DB_PATH=/tmp/pantrypal-demo.db ./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```
*** End Patch

+- Apply `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`
+- Seed demo data from `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`
+
+## Optional commands
+
+Create DB only if missing:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh setup
+```
+
+Force recreate DB:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```
+
+Override DB file path:
+
+```bash
+DB_PATH=/tmp/pantrypal-demo.db ./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```

files.patch:
Index: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md
===================================================================
--- /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md
+++ /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+# Backend DB Setup
+
+Local SQLite setup for backend Phase 1 tasks.
+
+## One-command reset
+
+Run from repo root:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/reset-local-db
+```
+
+This will:
+- Recreate `database/sqlite/pantrypal.db`
+- Apply `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`
+- Seed demo data from `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`
+
+## Optional commands
+
+Create DB only if missing:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh setup
+```
+
+Force recreate DB:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```
+
+Override DB file path:
+
+```bash
+DB_PATH=/tmp/pantrypal-demo.db ./scripts/db/local_db.sh reset
+```

<content>
1: #!/usr/bin/env bash
2: 
3: set -euo pipefail
4: 
5: ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
6: DB_PATH="${DB_PATH:-$ROOT_DIR/database/sqlite/pantrypal.db}"
7: MIGRATION_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql"
8: SEED_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql"
9: MODE="${1:-reset}"
10: 
11: if [[ ! -f "$MIGRATION_PATH" ]]; then
12:   printf "Missing migration file: %s\n" "$MIGRATION_PATH" >&2
13:   exit 1
14: fi
15: 
16: if [[ ! -f "$SEED_PATH" ]]; then
17:   printf "Missing seed file: %s\n" "$SEED_PATH" >&2
18:   exit 1
19: fi
20: 
21: mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB_PATH")"
22: 
23: case "$MODE" in
24:   setup)
25:     if [[ -f "$DB_PATH" ]]; then
26:       printf "Database already exists: %s\n" "$DB_PATH"
27:       printf "Use '%s reset' to recreate it.\n" "$0"
28:       exit 0
29:     fi
30:     ;;
31:   reset)
32:     rm -f "$DB_PATH"
33:     ;;
34:   *)
35:     printf "Usage: %s [setup|reset]\n" "$0" >&2
36:     exit 1
37:     ;;
38: esac
39: 
40: sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$MIGRATION_PATH"
41: sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$SEED_PATH"
42: 
43: printf "Database ready at %s\n" "$DB_PATH"

(End of file - total 43 lines)
</content>

#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
DB_PATH="${DB_PATH:-$ROOT_DIR/database/sqlite/pantrypal.db}"
MIGRATION_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql"
SEED_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql"
MODE="${1:-reset}"

if [[ ! -f "$MIGRATION_PATH" ]]; then
  printf "Missing migration file: %s\n" "$MIGRATION_PATH" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! -f "$SEED_PATH" ]]; then
  printf "Missing seed file: %s\n" "$SEED_PATH" >&2
  exit 1
fi

metadata.preview:
# Backend DB Setup

Local SQLite setup for backend Phase 1 tasks.

## One-command reset

Run from repo root:

```bash
./scripts/db/reset-local-db
```

This will:
- Recreate `database/sqlite/pantrypal.db`
- Apply `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`
- Seed demo data from `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`

## Optional commands

Create DB only if missing:

parts.text:
Implemented Step 1 (Schema + setup + seed) end-to-end for backend.

- Added full SQLite initial migration with all Phase 1 tables, constraints, and indexes in `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`.
- Added deterministic demo seed data (user/profile/budget, 10 ingredients, 4 recipes, recipe ingredients, pantry stock) in `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`.
- Added one-command DB reset flow via `./scripts/db/reset-local-db` backed by `scripts/db/local_db.sh` (supports `setup|reset` and optional `DB_PATH` override).
- Added setup docs in `docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md`.
- Verified locally by running `./scripts/db/reset-local-db` and checking created tables + seed counts.

Quick verification results:
- Tables created: `users`, `user_body_metrics`, `user_preferences`, `budgets`, `purchases`, `ingredients`, `recipes`, `recipe_ingredients`, `pantry_items`, `meal_plans`, `plan_meals`, `consumption_log`, `chat_messages`.
- Seed counts: `ingredients=10`, `recipes=4`, `pantry_items=10`.

Changed files:
- `backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql`
- `backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql`
- `scripts/db/local_db.sh`
- `scripts/db/reset-local-db`
- `docs/architecture/backend-db-setup.md`

Next natural step is Step 2: implement auth/profile endpoints on top of this schema.

diffs.patch:
Index: backend/cmd/api/main.go
===================================================================
--- backend/cmd/api/main.go	
+++ backend/cmd/api/main.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,786 @@
+package main
+
+import (
+    "context"
+    "crypto/hmac"
+    "crypto/rand"
+    "crypto/sha256"
+    "database/sql"
+    "encoding/base64"
+    "encoding/hex"
+    "encoding/json"
+    "errors"
+    "fmt"
+    "log"
+    "net/http"
+    "os"
+    "strconv"
+    "strings"
+    "time"
+
+    "golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
+    _ "modernc.org/sqlite"
+)
+
+type app struct {
+    db          *sql.DB
+    tokenSecret []byte
+    tokenTTL    time.Duration
+}
+
+type apiError struct {
+    Error struct {
+        Code    string `json:"code"`
+        Message string `json:"message"`
+    } `json:"error"`
+}
+
+type userResponse struct {
+    ID          string `json:"id"`
+    Email       string `json:"email"`
+    DisplayName string `json:"displayName,omitempty"`
+}
+
+type authResponse struct {
+    Token     string       `json:"token"`
+    ExpiresAt string       `json:"expiresAt"`
+    User      userResponse `json:"user"`
+}
+
+type profileResponse struct {
+    User        userResponse      `json:"user"`
+    Metrics     profileMetricsOut `json:"metrics"`
+    Preferences profilePrefsOut   `json:"preferences"`
+    Budget      profileBudgetOut  `json:"budget"`
+}
+
+type profileMetricsOut struct {
+    HeightCM      *float64 `json:"heightCm"`
+    WeightKG      *float64 `json:"weightKg"`
+    Age           *int     `json:"age"`
+    Sex           *string  `json:"sex"`
+    ActivityLevel *string  `json:"activityLevel"`
+    Goal          *string  `json:"goal"`
+}
+
+type profilePrefsOut struct {
+    DietType           string   `json:"dietType"`
+    Allergies          []string `json:"allergies"`
+    Dislikes           []string `json:"dislikes"`
+    Likes              []string `json:"likes"`
+    DailyCalorieTarget *int     `json:"dailyCalorieTarget"`
+    Notes              *string  `json:"notes"`
+}
+
+type profileBudgetOut struct {
+    Month       string `json:"month"`
+    Currency    string `json:"currency"`
+    AmountCents int    `json:"amountCents"`
+}
+
+type authClaims struct {
+    UserID string `json:"uid"`
+    Exp    int64  `json:"exp"`
+}
+
+type key int
+
+const userIDKey key = 1
+
+func main() {
+    dbPath := envOr("DB_PATH", "../database/sqlite/pantrypal.db")
+    port := envOr("PORT", "8080")
+    tokenSecret := envOr("TOKEN_SECRET", "pantrypal-local-dev-secret")
+    tokenHours, err := strconv.Atoi(envOr("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS", "24"))
+    if err != nil || tokenHours < 1 {
+        log.Fatal("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS must be a positive integer")
+    }
+
+    db, err := sql.Open("sqlite", dbPath)
+    if err != nil {
+        log.Fatalf("open db: %v", err)
+    }
+    defer db.Close()
+
+    if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
+        log.Fatalf("ping db: %v", err)
+    }
+    if _, err := db.Exec("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;"); err != nil {
+        log.Fatalf("enable foreign keys: %v", err)
+    }
+
+    a := &app{
+        db:          db,
+        tokenSecret: []byte(tokenSecret),
+        tokenTTL:    time.Duration(tokenHours) * time.Hour,
+    }
+
+    mux := http.NewServeMux()
+    mux.HandleFunc("GET /health", a.handleHealth)
+    mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/register", a.handleRegister)
+    mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/login", a.handleLogin)
+    mux.Handle("GET /me", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handleMe)))
+    mux.Handle("GET /profile", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handleGetProfile)))
+    mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/metrics", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchMetrics)))
+    mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/preferences", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchPreferences)))
+    mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/budget", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchBudget)))
+
+    server := &http.Server{
+        Addr:              ":" + port,
+        Handler:           a.withCORS(a.withLogging(mux)),
+        ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
+    }
+
+    log.Printf("api listening on :%s using db %s", port, dbPath)
+    if err := server.ListenAndServe(); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
+        log.Fatal(err)
+    }
+}
+
+func (a *app) handleHealth(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
+}
+
+type registerRequest struct {
+    Email       string `json:"email"`
+    Password    string `json:"password"`
+    DisplayName string `json:"displayName"`
+}
+
+func (a *app) handleRegister(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    var req registerRequest
+    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
+        return
+    }
+    req.Email = strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(req.Email))
+    req.DisplayName = strings.TrimSpace(req.DisplayName)
+    if !strings.Contains(req.Email, "@") {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "email is invalid")
+        return
+    }
+    if len(req.Password) < 8 {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "password must be at least 8 characters")
+        return
+    }
+
+    exists, err := a.userExistsByEmail(r.Context(), req.Email)
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to check user")
+        return
+    }
+    if exists {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusConflict, "conflict", "email already registered")
+        return
+    }
+
+    hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(req.Password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to hash password")
+        return
+    }
+
+    userID, err := newID("usr")
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate user id")
+        return
+    }
+
+    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
+        r.Context(),
+        `INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+        userID,
+        req.Email,
+        string(hash),
+        req.DisplayName,
+    )
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create user")
+        return
+    }
+
+    if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(r.Context(), userID); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to initialize profile")
+        return
+    }
+
+    token, expiresAt, err := a.makeToken(authClaims{UserID: userID})
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create token")
+        return
+    }
+
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, authResponse{
+        Token:     token,
+        ExpiresAt: expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339),
+        User: userResponse{
+            ID:          userID,
+            Email:       req.Email,
+            DisplayName: req.DisplayName,
+        },
+    })
+}
+
+type loginRequest struct {
+    Email    string `json:"email"`
+    Password string `json:"password"`
+}
+
+func (a *app) handleLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    var req loginRequest
+    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
+        return
+    }
+    req.Email = strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(req.Email))
+
+    var id string
+    var email string
+    var hash string
+    var displayName sql.NullString
+    err := a.db.QueryRowContext(
+        r.Context(),
+        `SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?`,
+        req.Email,
+    ).Scan(&id, &email, &hash, &displayName)
+    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid credentials")
+        return
+    }
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load user")
+        return
+    }
+    if bcrypt.CompareHashAndPassword([]byte(hash), []byte(req.Password)) != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid credentials")
+        return
+    }
+
+    if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(r.Context(), id); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to initialize profile")
+        return
+    }
+
+    token, expiresAt, err := a.makeToken(authClaims{UserID: id})
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create token")
+        return
+    }
+
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, authResponse{
+        Token:     token,
+        ExpiresAt: expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339),
+        User: userResponse{
+            ID:          id,
+            Email:       email,
+            DisplayName: displayName.String,
+        },
+    })
+}
+
+func (a *app) handleMe(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
+    if !ok {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
+        return
+    }
+
+    var user userResponse
+    err := a.db.QueryRowContext(
+        r.Context(),
+        `SELECT id, email, COALESCE(display_name, '') FROM users WHERE id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&user.ID, &user.Email, &user.DisplayName)
+    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "user not found")
+        return
+    }
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load current user")
+        return
+    }
+
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]userResponse{"user": user})
+}
+
+func (a *app) handleGetProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
+    if !ok {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
+        return
+    }
+
+    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
+    if err != nil {
+        if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "not_found", "profile not found")
+            return
+        }
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
+        return
+    }
+
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
+}
+
+type patchMetricsRequest struct {
+    HeightCM      *float64 `json:"heightCm"`
+    WeightKG      *float64 `json:"weightKg"`
+    Age           *int     `json:"age"`
+    Sex           *string  `json:"sex"`
+    ActivityLevel *string  `json:"activityLevel"`
+    Goal          *string  `json:"goal"`
+}
+
+func (a *app) handlePatchMetrics(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
+    if !ok {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
+        return
+    }
+
+    var req patchMetricsRequest
+    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
+        return
+    }
+
+    rowID, err := newID("ubm")
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate metrics id")
+        return
+    }
+
+    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
+        r.Context(),
+        `INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id, height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
+             height_cm = excluded.height_cm,
+             weight_kg = excluded.weight_kg,
+             age = excluded.age,
+             sex = excluded.sex,
+             activity_level = excluded.activity_level,
+             goal = excluded.goal,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+        rowID,
+        userID,
+        req.HeightCM,
+        req.WeightKG,
+        req.Age,
+        req.Sex,
+        req.ActivityLevel,
+        req.Goal,
+    )
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "failed to update metrics")
+        return
+    }
+
+    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
+        return
+    }
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
+}
+
+type patchPreferencesRequest struct {
+    DietType           *string  `json:"dietType"`
+    Allergies          []string `json:"allergies"`
+    Dislikes           []string `json:"dislikes"`
+    Likes              []string `json:"likes"`
+    DailyCalorieTarget *int     `json:"dailyCalorieTarget"`
+    Notes              *string  `json:"notes"`
+}
+
+func (a *app) handlePatchPreferences(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
+    if !ok {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
+        return
+    }
+
+    var req patchPreferencesRequest
+    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
+        return
+    }
+
+    allergiesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Allergies)
+    dislikesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Dislikes)
+    likesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Likes)
+
+    dietType := "omnivore"
+    if req.DietType != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType) != "" {
+        dietType = strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType)
+    }
+
+    rowID, err := newID("upr")
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate preferences id")
+        return
+    }
+
+    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
+        r.Context(),
+        `INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
+             diet_type = excluded.diet_type,
+             allergies_json = excluded.allergies_json,
+             dislikes_json = excluded.dislikes_json,
+             likes_json = excluded.likes_json,
+             daily_calorie_target = excluded.daily_calorie_target,
+             notes = excluded.notes,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+        rowID,
+        userID,
+        dietType,
+        string(allergiesJSON),
+        string(dislikesJSON),
+        string(likesJSON),
+        req.DailyCalorieTarget,
+        req.Notes,
+    )
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "failed to update preferences")
+        return
+    }
+
+    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
+        return
+    }
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
+}
+
+type patchBudgetRequest struct {
+    Month       *string `json:"month"`
+    Currency    *string `json:"currency"`
+    AmountCents *int    `json:"amountCents"`
+}
+
+func (a *app) handlePatchBudget(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
+    if !ok {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
+        return
+    }
+
+    var req patchBudgetRequest
+    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
+        return
+    }
+    if req.AmountCents == nil || *req.AmountCents < 0 {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "amountCents is required and must be >= 0")
+        return
+    }
+
+    month := time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
+    if req.Month != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month) != "" {
+        month = strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month)
+    }
+    currency := "USD"
+    if req.Currency != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Currency) != "" {
+        currency = strings.ToUpper(strings.TrimSpace(*req.Currency))
+    }
+
+    rowID, err := newID("bdg")
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate budget id")
+        return
+    }
+
+    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
+        r.Context(),
+        `INSERT INTO budgets (id, user_id, month, currency, amount_cents)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id, month) DO UPDATE SET
+             currency = excluded.currency,
+             amount_cents = excluded.amount_cents,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+        rowID,
+        userID,
+        month,
+        currency,
+        *req.AmountCents,
+    )
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "failed to update budget")
+        return
+    }
+
+    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
+    if err != nil {
+        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
+        return
+    }
+    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
+}
+
+func (a *app) loadProfile(ctx context.Context, userID string) (profileResponse, error) {
+    if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(ctx, userID); err != nil {
+        return profileResponse{}, err
+    }
+
+    var out profileResponse
+    err := a.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT id, email, COALESCE(display_name, '') FROM users WHERE id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.User.ID, &out.User.Email, &out.User.DisplayName)
+    if err != nil {
+        return profileResponse{}, err
+    }
+
+    var sex sql.NullString
+    var activity sql.NullString
+    var goal sql.NullString
+    err = a.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal FROM user_body_metrics WHERE user_id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Metrics.HeightCM, &out.Metrics.WeightKG, &out.Metrics.Age, &sex, &activity, &goal)
+    if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        return profileResponse{}, err
+    }
+    if sex.Valid {
+        out.Metrics.Sex = &sex.String
+    }
+    if activity.Valid {
+        out.Metrics.ActivityLevel = &activity.String
+    }
+    if goal.Valid {
+        out.Metrics.Goal = &goal.String
+    }
+
+    var allergiesJSON string
+    var dislikesJSON string
+    var likesJSON string
+    var notes sql.NullString
+    err = a.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes
+         FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Preferences.DietType, &allergiesJSON, &dislikesJSON, &likesJSON, &out.Preferences.DailyCalorieTarget, &notes)
+    if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        return profileResponse{}, err
+    }
+    if out.Preferences.DietType == "" {
+        out.Preferences.DietType = "omnivore"
+    }
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(allergiesJSON), &out.Preferences.Allergies)
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(dislikesJSON), &out.Preferences.Dislikes)
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(likesJSON), &out.Preferences.Likes)
+    if notes.Valid {
+        out.Preferences.Notes = &notes.String
+    }
+
+    err = a.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT month, currency, amount_cents
+         FROM budgets
+         WHERE user_id = ?
+         ORDER BY month DESC
+         LIMIT 1`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Budget.Month, &out.Budget.Currency, &out.Budget.AmountCents)
+    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        out.Budget.Month = time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
+        out.Budget.Currency = "USD"
+        out.Budget.AmountCents = 0
+        return out, nil
+    }
+    if err != nil {
+        return profileResponse{}, err
+    }
+    return out, nil
+}
+
+func (a *app) ensureDefaultProfileRows(ctx context.Context, userID string) error {
+    if _, err := a.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json)
+         VALUES (?, ?, 'omnivore', '[]', '[]', '[]')
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
+        mustID("upr"),
+        userID,
+    ); err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+    if _, err := a.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id)
+         VALUES (?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
+        mustID("ubm"),
+        userID,
+    ); err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+    return nil
+}
+
+func (a *app) userExistsByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (bool, error) {
+    var n int
+    if err := a.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE email = ?`, email).Scan(&n); err != nil {
+        return false, err
+    }
+    return n > 0, nil
+}
+
+func (a *app) authRequired(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+        authHeader := strings.TrimSpace(r.Header.Get("Authorization"))
+        token := strings.TrimPrefix(authHeader, "Bearer ")
+        if token == authHeader || token == "" {
+            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing bearer token")
+            return
+        }
+
+        claims, err := a.parseToken(token)
+        if err != nil {
+            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token")
+            return
+        }
+
+        var exists int
+        err = a.db.QueryRowContext(r.Context(), `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE id = ?`, claims.UserID).Scan(&exists)
+        if err != nil || exists == 0 {
+            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token user")
+            return
+        }
+
+        ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), userIDKey, claims.UserID)
+        next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
+    })
+}
+
+func (a *app) withCORS(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
+        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Authorization, Content-Type")
+        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS")
+        if r.Method == http.MethodOptions {
+            w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
+            return
+        }
+        next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
+    })
+}
+
+func (a *app) withLogging(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+        start := time.Now()
+        next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
+        log.Printf("%s %s (%s)", r.Method, r.URL.Path, time.Since(start).Round(time.Millisecond))
+    })
+}
+
+func (a *app) makeToken(claims authClaims) (string, time.Time, error) {
+    expiresAt := time.Now().UTC().Add(a.tokenTTL)
+    claims.Exp = expiresAt.Unix()
+
+    payload, err := json.Marshal(claims)
+    if err != nil {
+        return "", time.Time{}, err
+    }
+
+    payload64 := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(payload)
+    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
+    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(payload64)); err != nil {
+        return "", time.Time{}, err
+    }
+    sig := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
+    return payload64 + "." + sig, expiresAt, nil
+}
+
+func (a *app) parseToken(token string) (authClaims, error) {
+    parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
+    if len(parts) != 2 {
+        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token format")
+    }
+
+    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
+    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(parts[0])); err != nil {
+        return authClaims{}, err
+    }
+    expected := mac.Sum(nil)
+    actual, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
+    if err != nil {
+        return authClaims{}, err
+    }
+    if !hmac.Equal(expected, actual) {
+        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token signature mismatch")
+    }
+
+    payload, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[0])
+    if err != nil {
+        return authClaims{}, err
+    }
+
+    var claims authClaims
+    if err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims); err != nil {
+        return authClaims{}, err
+    }
+    if claims.UserID == "" || claims.Exp == 0 {
+        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token claims")
+    }
+    if time.Now().UTC().Unix() > claims.Exp {
+        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token expired")
+    }
+    return claims, nil
+}
+
+func userIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) (string, bool) {
+    v := ctx.Value(userIDKey)
+    id, ok := v.(string)
+    return id, ok
+}
+
+func readJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
+    dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
+    dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
+    return dec.Decode(dst)
+}
+
+func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
+    w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+    w.WriteHeader(status)
+    _ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
+}
+
+func writeAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
+    var out apiError
+    out.Error.Code = code
+    out.Error.Message = message
+    writeJSON(w, status, out)
+}
+
+func newID(prefix string) (string, error) {
+    b := make([]byte, 8)
+    if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
+        return "", err
+    }
+    return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
+}
+
+func mustID(prefix string) string {
+    id, err := newID(prefix)
+    if err != nil {
+        panic(err)
+    }
+    return id
+}
+
+func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
+    v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
+    if v == "" {
+        return fallback
+    }
+    return v
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,179 @@
+# Backend API v1 - Auth and Profile
+
+Base URL (local): `http://localhost:8080`
+
+## Error format
+
+All failures return:
+
+```json
+{
+  "error": {
+    "code": "validation_error",
+    "message": "human readable message"
+  }
+}
+```
+
+## Authentication
+
+- Token type: Bearer token from `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
+- Token expiry: controlled by `TOKEN_TTL_HOURS` (default `24`)
+
+## Endpoints
+
+### `POST /auth/register`
+
+Request:
+
+```json
+{
+  "email": "newuser@pantrypal.local",
+  "password": "Passw0rd!",
+  "displayName": "New User"
+}
+```
+
+Response `201`:
+
+```json
+{
+  "token": "<bearer-token>",
+  "expiresAt": "2026-05-29T12:00:00Z",
+  "user": {
+    "id": "usr_...",
+    "email": "newuser@pantrypal.local",
+    "displayName": "New User"
+  }
+}
+```
+
+### `POST /auth/login`
+
+Request:
+
+```json
+{
+  "email": "newuser@pantrypal.local",
+  "password": "Passw0rd!"
+}
+```
+
+Response `200`: same shape as register response.
+
+### `GET /me`
+
+Headers: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
+
+Response `200`:
+
+```json
+{
+  "user": {
+    "id": "usr_...",
+    "email": "newuser@pantrypal.local",
+    "displayName": "New User"
+  }
+}
+```
+
+### `GET /profile`
+
+Headers: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
+
+Response `200`:
+
+```json
+{
+  "user": {
+    "id": "usr_...",
+    "email": "newuser@pantrypal.local",
+    "displayName": "New User"
+  },
+  "metrics": {
+    "heightCm": 172,
+    "weightKg": 70,
+    "age": 29,
+    "sex": "male",
+    "activityLevel": "moderate",
+    "goal": "maintain"
+  },
+  "preferences": {
+    "dietType": "omnivore",
+    "allergies": ["peanuts"],
+    "dislikes": ["mushrooms"],
+    "likes": ["rice"],
+    "dailyCalorieTarget": 2300,
+    "notes": "test"
+  },
+  "budget": {
+    "month": "2026-06",
+    "currency": "USD",
+    "amountCents": 50000
+  }
+}
+```
+
+### `PATCH /profile/metrics`
+
+Headers: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
+
+Request:
+
+```json
+{
+  "heightCm": 172,
+  "weightKg": 70,
+  "age": 29,
+  "sex": "male",
+  "activityLevel": "moderate",
+  "goal": "maintain"
+}
+```
+
+Response `200`: full `GET /profile` shape.
+
+### `PATCH /profile/preferences`
+
+Headers: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
+
+Request:
+
+```json
+{
+  "dietType": "omnivore",
+  "allergies": ["peanuts"],
+  "dislikes": ["mushrooms"],
+  "likes": ["rice"],
+  "dailyCalorieTarget": 2300,
+  "notes": "test"
+}
+```
+
+Response `200`: full `GET /profile` shape.
+
+### `PATCH /profile/budget`
+
+Headers: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
+
+Request:
+
+```json
+{
+  "month": "2026-06",
+  "currency": "USD",
+  "amountCents": 50000
+}
+```
+
+Response `200`: full `GET /profile` shape.
+
+### `GET /health`
+
+Response `200`:
+
+```json
+{
+  "status": "ok"
+}
+```
