-func (a *app) makeToken(claims authClaims) (string, time.Time, error) {
-    expiresAt := time.Now().UTC().Add(a.tokenTTL)
-    claims.Exp = expiresAt.Unix()
-
-    payload, err := json.Marshal(claims)
-    if err != nil {
-        return "", time.Time{}, err
-    }
-
-    payload64 := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(payload)
-    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
-    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(payload64)); err != nil {
-        return "", time.Time{}, err
-    }
-    sig := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
-    return payload64 + "." + sig, expiresAt, nil
-}
-
-func (a *app) parseToken(token string) (authClaims, error) {
-    parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
-    if len(parts) != 2 {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token format")
-    }
-
-    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
-    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(parts[0])); err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    expected := mac.Sum(nil)
-    actual, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
-    if err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    if !hmac.Equal(expected, actual) {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token signature mismatch")
-    }
-
-    payload, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[0])
-    if err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-
-    var claims authClaims
-    if err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims); err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    if claims.UserID == "" || claims.Exp == 0 {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token claims")
-    }
-    if time.Now().UTC().Unix() > claims.Exp {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token expired")
-    }
-    return claims, nil
-}
-
-func userIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) (string, bool) {
-    v := ctx.Value(userIDKey)
-    id, ok := v.(string)
-    return id, ok
-}
-
-func readJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
-    dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
-    dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
-    return dec.Decode(dst)
-}
-
-func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
-    w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
-    w.WriteHeader(status)
-    _ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
-}
-
-func writeAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
-    var out apiError
-    out.Error.Code = code
-    out.Error.Message = message
-    writeJSON(w, status, out)
-}
-
-func newID(prefix string) (string, error) {
-    b := make([]byte, 8)
-    if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
-        return "", err
-    }
-    return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
-}
-
-func mustID(prefix string) string {
-    id, err := newID(prefix)
-    if err != nil {
-        panic(err)
-    }
-    return id
-}
-
-func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
-    v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
-    if v == "" {
-        return fallback
-    }
-    return v
-}

Index: backend/cmd/dbseed/main.go
===================================================================
--- backend/cmd/dbseed/main.go	
+++ backend/cmd/dbseed/main.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+package main
+
+import (
+	"flag"
+	"log"
+	"os"
+
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/db"
+)
+
+func main() {
+	dbPath := flag.String("db", "../database/sqlite/pantrypal.db", "path to sqlite db file")
+	migrationPath := flag.String("migration", "./migrations/001_init_schema.sql", "path to migration sql file")
+	seedPath := flag.String("seed", "./seeds/001_seed_demo.sql", "path to seed sql file")
+	reset := flag.Bool("reset", false, "delete db file before applying migration + seed")
+	flag.Parse()
+
+	if *reset {
+		_ = os.Remove(*dbPath)
+	}
+
+	conn, err := db.Open(*dbPath)
+	if err != nil {
+		log.Fatalf("open db: %v", err)
+	}
+	defer conn.Close()
+
+	if err := db.ApplySQLFile(conn, *migrationPath); err != nil {
+		log.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if err := db.ApplySQLFile(conn, *seedPath); err != nil {
+		log.Fatal(err)
+	}
+
+	log.Printf("database bootstrapped at %s", *dbPath)
+}

Index: backend/internal/app/app.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/app/app.go	
+++ backend/internal/app/app.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+package app
+
+import (
+	"fmt"
+	"log"
+	"net/http"
+	"time"
+
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/config"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/auth"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/db"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/repositories"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/services"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/handlers"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/router"
+)
+
+func Run(cfg config.Config) error {
+	conn, err := db.Open(cfg.DBPath)
+	if err != nil {
+		return fmt.Errorf("open db: %w", err)
+	}
+	defer conn.Close()
+
+	userRepo := repositories.NewUserRepository(conn)
+	tokenManager := auth.NewTokenManager(cfg.TokenSecret, cfg.TokenTTL)
+
+	authService := services.NewAuthService(userRepo, tokenManager)
+	profileService := services.NewProfileService(userRepo)
+
+	healthHandler := handlers.NewHealthHandler()
+	authHandler := handlers.NewAuthHandler(authService)
+	profileHandler := handlers.NewProfileHandler(profileService)
+
+	rootHandler := router.New(router.Handlers{
+		Health:  healthHandler,
+		Auth:    authHandler,
+		Profile: profileHandler,
+	}, tokenManager, userRepo)
+
+	server := &http.Server{
+		Addr:              ":" + cfg.Port,
+		Handler:           rootHandler,
+		ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
+	}
+
+	log.Printf("api listening on :%s using db %s", cfg.Port, cfg.DBPath)
+	return server.ListenAndServe()
+}

Index: backend/internal/config/config.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/config/config.go	
+++ backend/internal/config/config.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+package config
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"os"
+	"strconv"
+	"strings"
+	"time"
+)
+
+type Config struct {
+	Port        string
+	DBPath      string
+	TokenSecret string
+	TokenTTL    time.Duration
+}
+
+func Load() (Config, error) {
+	tokenHours, err := strconv.Atoi(envOr("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS", "24"))
+	if err != nil {
+		return Config{}, err
+	}
+	if tokenHours < 1 {
+		return Config{}, errors.New("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS must be positive")
+	}
+
+	return Config{
+		Port:        envOr("PORT", "8080"),
+		DBPath:      envOr("DB_PATH", "../database/sqlite/pantrypal.db"),
+		TokenSecret: envOr("TOKEN_SECRET", "pantrypal-local-dev-secret"),
+		TokenTTL:    time.Duration(tokenHours) * time.Hour,
+	}, nil
+}
+
+func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
+	v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
+	if v == "" {
+		return fallback
+	}
+	return v
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+package db
+
+import (
+	"database/sql"
+	"fmt"
+	"os"
+)
+
+func ApplySQLFile(conn *sql.DB, path string) error {
+	sqlBytes, err := os.ReadFile(path)
+	if err != nil {
+		return fmt.Errorf("read sql file %s: %w", path, err)
+	}
+	if _, err := conn.Exec(string(sqlBytes)); err != nil {
+		return fmt.Errorf("execute sql file %s: %w", path, err)
+	}
+	return nil
+}

Index: backend/internal/platform/db/sqlite.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/platform/db/sqlite.go	
+++ backend/internal/platform/db/sqlite.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package db
+
+import (
+	"database/sql"
+
+	_ "modernc.org/sqlite"
+)
+
+func Open(path string) (*sql.DB, error) {
+	conn, err := sql.Open("sqlite", path)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, err
+	}
+	if err := conn.Ping(); err != nil {
+		conn.Close()
+		return nil, err
+	}
+	if _, err := conn.Exec("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;"); err != nil {
+		conn.Close()
+		return nil, err
+	}
+	return conn, nil
+}

Index: backend/internal/platform/id/id.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/platform/id/id.go	
+++ backend/internal/platform/id/id.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package id
+
+import (
+	"crypto/rand"
+	"encoding/hex"
+	"fmt"
+)
+
+func New(prefix string) (string, error) {
+	b := make([]byte, 8)
+	if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
+		return "", err
+	}
+	return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
+}
+
+func Must(prefix string) string {
+	v, err := New(prefix)
+	if err != nil {
+		panic(err)
+	}
+	return v
+}

+++ backend/internal/repositories/user_repository.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,301 @@
+package repositories
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"database/sql"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"strings"
+	"time"
+
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/id"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/dto"
+)
+
+type User struct {
+	ID           string
+	Email        string
+	PasswordHash string
+	DisplayName  string
+}
+
+type UserRepository struct {
+	db *sql.DB
+}
+
+func NewUserRepository(db *sql.DB) *UserRepository {
+	return &UserRepository{db: db}
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) ExistsByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (bool, error) {
+	var n int
+	if err := r.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE email = ?`, email).Scan(&n); err != nil {
+		return false, err
+	}
+	return n > 0, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) CreateUser(ctx context.Context, email, passwordHash, displayName string) (User, error) {
+	userID, err := id.New("usr")
+	if err != nil {
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+
+	_, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+		ctx,
+		`INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+		userID,
+		email,
+		passwordHash,
+		displayName,
+	)
+	if err != nil {
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+
+	if err := r.EnsureDefaultProfileRows(ctx, userID); err != nil {
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+
+	return User{ID: userID, Email: email, DisplayName: displayName}, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) GetByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (User, error) {
+	var out User
+	var displayName sql.NullString
+	err := r.db.QueryRowContext(
+		ctx,
+		`SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?`,
+		email,
+	).Scan(&out.ID, &out.Email, &out.PasswordHash, &displayName)
+	if err != nil {
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+	if displayName.Valid {
+		out.DisplayName = displayName.String
+	}
+	return out, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, userID string) (User, error) {
+	var out User
+	err := r.db.QueryRowContext(
+		ctx,
+		`SELECT id, email, COALESCE(display_name, '') FROM users WHERE id = ?`,
+		userID,
+	).Scan(&out.ID, &out.Email, &out.DisplayName)
+	if err != nil {
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+	return out, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) ExistsByID(ctx context.Context, userID string) (bool, error) {
+	var n int
+	if err := r.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE id = ?`, userID).Scan(&n); err != nil {
+		return false, err
+	}
+	return n > 0, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) EnsureDefaultProfileRows(ctx context.Context, userID string) error {
+	if _, err := r.db.ExecContext(
+		ctx,
+		`INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json)
+         VALUES (?, ?, 'omnivore', '[]', '[]', '[]')
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
+		id.Must("upr"),
+		userID,
+	); err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+	if _, err := r.db.ExecContext(
+		ctx,
+		`INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id)
+         VALUES (?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
+		id.Must("ubm"),
+		userID,
+	); err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+	return nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) GetProfile(ctx context.Context, userID string) (dto.ProfileResponse, error) {
+	if err := r.EnsureDefaultProfileRows(ctx, userID); err != nil {
+		return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+	}
+
+	user, err := r.GetByID(ctx, userID)
+	if err != nil {
+		return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+	}
+
+	out := dto.ProfileResponse{
+		User: dto.UserResponse{
+			ID:          user.ID,
+			Email:       user.Email,
+			DisplayName: user.DisplayName,
+		},
+	}
+
+	var sex sql.NullString
+	var activity sql.NullString
+	var goal sql.NullString
+	err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+		ctx,
+		`SELECT height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal FROM user_body_metrics WHERE user_id = ?`,
+		userID,
+	).Scan(&out.Metrics.HeightCM, &out.Metrics.WeightKG, &out.Metrics.Age, &sex, &activity, &goal)
+	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+		return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+	}
+	if sex.Valid {
+		out.Metrics.Sex = &sex.String
+	}
+	if activity.Valid {
+		out.Metrics.ActivityLevel = &activity.String
+	}
+	if goal.Valid {
+		out.Metrics.Goal = &goal.String
+	}
+
+	var allergiesJSON string
+	var dislikesJSON string
+	var likesJSON string
+	var notes sql.NullString
+	err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+		ctx,
+		`SELECT diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes
+         FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = ?`,
+		userID,
+	).Scan(&out.Preferences.DietType, &allergiesJSON, &dislikesJSON, &likesJSON, &out.Preferences.DailyCalorieTarget, &notes)
+	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+		return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+	}
+	if out.Preferences.DietType == "" {
+		out.Preferences.DietType = "omnivore"
+	}
+	_ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(allergiesJSON), &out.Preferences.Allergies)
+	_ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(dislikesJSON), &out.Preferences.Dislikes)
+	_ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(likesJSON), &out.Preferences.Likes)
+	if notes.Valid {
+		out.Preferences.Notes = &notes.String
+	}
+
+	err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+		ctx,
+		`SELECT month, currency, amount_cents FROM budgets WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1`,
+		userID,
+	).Scan(&out.Budget.Month, &out.Budget.Currency, &out.Budget.AmountCents)
+	if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+		out.Budget.Month = time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
+		out.Budget.Currency = "USD"
+		out.Budget.AmountCents = 0
+		return out, nil
+	}
+	if err != nil {
+		return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+	}
+	return out, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertMetrics(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchMetricsRequest) error {
+	rowID, err := id.New("ubm")
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+	_, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+		ctx,
+		`INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id, height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
+             height_cm = excluded.height_cm,
+             weight_kg = excluded.weight_kg,
+             age = excluded.age,
+             sex = excluded.sex,
+             activity_level = excluded.activity_level,
+             goal = excluded.goal,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+		rowID,
+		userID,
+		req.HeightCM,
+		req.WeightKG,
+		req.Age,
+		req.Sex,
+		req.ActivityLevel,
+		req.Goal,
+	)
+	return err
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertPreferences(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchPreferencesRequest) error {
+	rowID, err := id.New("upr")
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+	allergiesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Allergies)
+	dislikesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Dislikes)
+	likesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Likes)
+
+	dietType := "omnivore"
+	if req.DietType != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType) != "" {
+		dietType = strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType)
+	}
+
+	_, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+		ctx,
+		`INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
+             diet_type = excluded.diet_type,
+             allergies_json = excluded.allergies_json,
+             dislikes_json = excluded.dislikes_json,
+             likes_json = excluded.likes_json,
+             daily_calorie_target = excluded.daily_calorie_target,
+             notes = excluded.notes,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+		rowID,
+		userID,
+		dietType,
+		string(allergiesJSON),
+		string(dislikesJSON),
+		string(likesJSON),
+		req.DailyCalorieTarget,
+		req.Notes,
+	)
+	return err
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertBudget(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchBudgetRequest) error {
+	rowID, err := id.New("bdg")
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	month := time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
+	if req.Month != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month) != "" {
+		month = strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month)
+	}
+	currency := "USD"
+	if req.Currency != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Currency) != "" {
+		currency = strings.ToUpper(strings.TrimSpace(*req.Currency))
+	}
+
+	_, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+		ctx,
+		`INSERT INTO budgets (id, user_id, month, currency, amount_cents)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id, month) DO UPDATE SET
+             currency = excluded.currency,
+             amount_cents = excluded.amount_cents,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+		rowID,
+		userID,
+		month,
+		currency,
+		*req.AmountCents,
+	)
+	return err
+}

Index: backend/internal/transport/http/handlers/response.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/transport/http/handlers/response.go	
+++ backend/internal/transport/http/handlers/response.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+package handlers
+
+import (
+	"encoding/json"
+	"net/http"
+
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/dto"
+)
+
+func ReadJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
+	dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
+	dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
+	return dec.Decode(dst)
+}
+
+func WriteJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+	w.WriteHeader(status)
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
+}
+
+func WriteAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
+	var out dto.APIError
+	out.Error.Code = code
+	out.Error.Message = message
+	WriteJSON(w, status, out)
+}

Index: backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/auth.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/auth.go	
+++ backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/auth.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+package middleware
+
+import (
+	"encoding/json"
+	"net/http"
+	"strings"
+
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/auth"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/repositories"
+)
+
+func AuthRequired(tokens *auth.TokenManager, users *repositories.UserRepository) func(http.Handler) http.Handler {
+	return func(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+		return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+			authHeader := strings.TrimSpace(r.Header.Get("Authorization"))
+			token := strings.TrimPrefix(authHeader, "Bearer ")
+			if token == authHeader || token == "" {
+				writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing bearer token")
+				return
+			}
+
+			claims, err := tokens.ParseToken(token)
+			if err != nil {
+				writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token")
+				return
+			}
+
+			exists, err := users.ExistsByID(r.Context(), claims.UserID)
+			if err != nil || !exists {
+				writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token user")
+				return
+			}
+
+			ctx := WithUserID(r.Context(), claims.UserID)
+			next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
+		})
+	}
+}
+
+func writeAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+	w.WriteHeader(status)
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{
+		"error": map[string]string{
+			"code":    code,
+			"message": message,
+		},
+	})
+}

Index: backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/common.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/common.go	
+++ backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/common.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+package middleware
+
+import (
+	"log"
+	"net/http"
+	"time"
+)
+
+func CORS(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
+		w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Authorization, Content-Type")
+		w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS")
+		if r.Method == http.MethodOptions {
+			w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
+			return
+		}
+		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
+	})
+}
+
+func Logging(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		start := time.Now()
+		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
+		log.Printf("%s %s (%s)", r.Method, r.URL.Path, time.Since(start).Round(time.Millisecond))
+	})
+}

Index: backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/context.go

--- backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/context.go	
+++ backend/internal/transport/http/middleware/context.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+package middleware
+
+import "context"
+
+type contextKey int
+
+const userIDKey contextKey = 1
+
+func WithUserID(ctx context.Context, userID string) context.Context {
+	return context.WithValue(ctx, userIDKey, userID)
+}
+
+func UserIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) (string, bool) {
+	v := ctx.Value(userIDKey)
+	id, ok := v.(string)
+	return id, ok
+}

Index: backend/internal/transport/http/router/router.go
===================================================================
--- backend/internal/transport/http/router/router.go	
+++ backend/internal/transport/http/router/router.go	
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+package router
+
+import (
+	"net/http"
+
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/auth"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/repositories"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/handlers"
+	"pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/middleware"
+)
+
+type Handlers struct {
+	Health  *handlers.HealthHandler
+	Auth    *handlers.AuthHandler
+	Profile *handlers.ProfileHandler
+}
+
+func New(h Handlers, tokens *auth.TokenManager, users *repositories.UserRepository) http.Handler {
+	mux := http.NewServeMux()
+
+	authRequired := middleware.AuthRequired(tokens, users)
+
+	mux.HandleFunc("GET /health", h.Health.GetHealth)
+	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/register", h.Auth.Register)
+	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/login", h.Auth.Login)
+	mux.Handle("GET /me", authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(h.Auth.Me)))
+	mux.Handle("GET /profile", authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(h.Profile.GetProfile)))
+	mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/metrics", authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(h.Profile.PatchMetrics)))
+	mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/preferences", authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(h.Profile.PatchPreferences)))
+	mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/budget", authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(h.Profile.PatchBudget)))
+
+	return middleware.CORS(middleware.Logging(mux))
+}

 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
 ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
 DB_PATH="${DB_PATH:-$ROOT_DIR/database/sqlite/pantrypal.db}"
 MIGRATION_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/migrations/001_init_schema.sql"
 SEED_PATH="$ROOT_DIR/backend/seeds/001_seed_demo.sql"
 MODE="${1:-reset}"
 
 if [[ ! -f "$MIGRATION_PATH" ]]; then
   printf "Missing migration file: %s\n" "$MIGRATION_PATH" >&2
   exit 1
 fi
 
 if [[ ! -f "$SEED_PATH" ]]; then
   printf "Missing seed file: %s\n" "$SEED_PATH" >&2
   exit 1
 fi
 
 mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB_PATH")"
 
 case "$MODE" in
   setup)
     if [[ -f "$DB_PATH" ]]; then
       printf "Database already exists: %s\n" "$DB_PATH"
       printf "Use '%s reset' to recreate it.\n" "$0"
       exit 0
     fi
     ;;
   reset)
-    rm -f "$DB_PATH"
     ;;
   *)
     printf "Usage: %s [setup|reset]\n" "$0" >&2
     exit 1
     ;;
 esac
 
-sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$MIGRATION_PATH"
-sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" < "$SEED_PATH"
+if [[ "$MODE" == "reset" ]]; then
+  (
+    cd "$ROOT_DIR/backend"
+    go run ./cmd/dbseed -db "$DB_PATH" -migration "$MIGRATION_PATH" -seed "$SEED_PATH" -reset
+  )
+else
+  (
+    cd "$ROOT_DIR/backend"
+    go run ./cmd/dbseed -db "$DB_PATH" -migration "$MIGRATION_PATH" -seed "$SEED_PATH"
+  )
+fi
 
 printf "Database ready at %s\n" "$DB_PATH"

104: 
105:     if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
106:         log.Fatalf("ping db: %v", err)
107:     }
108:     if _, err := db.Exec("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;"); err != nil {
109:         log.Fatalf("enable foreign keys: %v", err)
110:     }
111: 
112:     a := &app{
113:         db:          db,
114:         tokenSecret: []byte(tokenSecret),
115:         tokenTTL:    time.Duration(tokenHours) * time.Hour,
116:     }
117: 
118:     mux := http.NewServeMux()
119:     mux.HandleFunc("GET /health", a.handleHealth)
120:     mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/register", a.handleRegister)
121:     mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/login", a.handleLogin)
122:     mux.Handle("GET /me", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handleMe)))
123:     mux.Handle("GET /profile", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handleGetProfile)))
124:     mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/metrics", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchMetrics)))
125:     mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/preferences", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchPreferences)))
126:     mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/budget", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchBudget)))
127: 
128:     server := &http.Server{
129:         Addr:              ":" + port,
130:         Handler:           a.withCORS(a.withLogging(mux)),
131:         ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
132:     }
133: 
134:     log.Printf("api listening on :%s using db %s", port, dbPath)
135:     if err := server.ListenAndServe(); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
136:         log.Fatal(err)
137:     }
138: }

144: type registerRequest struct {
145:     Email       string `json:"email"`
146:     Password    string `json:"password"`
147:     DisplayName string `json:"displayName"`
148: }
149: 
150: func (a *app) handleRegister(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
151:     var req registerRequest
152:     if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
153:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
154:         return
155:     }
156:     req.Email = strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(req.Email))
157:     req.DisplayName = strings.TrimSpace(req.DisplayName)
158:     if !strings.Contains(req.Email, "@") {
159:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "email is invalid")
160:         return
161:     }
162:     if len(req.Password) < 8 {
163:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "password must be at least 8 characters")
164:         return
165:     }
166: 
167:     exists, err := a.userExistsByEmail(r.Context(), req.Email)
168:     if err != nil {
169:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to check user")
170:         return
171:     }
172:     if exists {
173:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusConflict, "conflict", "email already registered")
174:         return
175:     }
176: 
177:     hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(req.Password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
178:     if err != nil {
179:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to hash password")
180:         return
181:     }
182: 
183:     userID, err := newID("usr")
184:     if err != nil {
185:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate user id")
186:         return
187:     }
188: 
189:     _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
190:         r.Context(),
191:         `INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`,
192:         userID,
193:         req.Email,
194:         string(hash),
195:         req.DisplayName,
196:     )
197:     if err != nil {
198:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create user")
199:         return
200:     }
201: 
202:     if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(r.Context(), userID); err != nil {
203:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to initialize profile")
204:         return
205:     }
206: 
207:     token, expiresAt, err := a.makeToken(authClaims{UserID: userID})
208:     if err != nil {
209:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create token")
210:         return
211:     }
212: 
213:     writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, authResponse{
214:         Token:     token,
215:         ExpiresAt: expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339),
216:         User: userResponse{
217:             ID:          userID,
218:             Email:       req.Email,
219:             DisplayName: req.DisplayName,
220:         },
221:     })
222: }

229: func (a *app) handleLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {

234:     }

246:     if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
247:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid credentials")

255:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid credentials")
256:         return
257:     }
258: 
259:     if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(r.Context(), id); err != nil {
260:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to initialize profile")
261:         return
262:     }
263:

265:     if err != nil {
266:         writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create token")
267:         return
268:     }
269: 
270:     writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, authResponse{
271:         Token:     token,
272:         ExpiresAt: expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339),
273:         User: userResponse{
274:             ID:          id,
275:             Email:       email,
276:             DisplayName: displayName.String,
277:         },
278:     })
279: }

524: func (a *app) loadProfile(ctx context.Context, userID string) (profileResponse, error) {
525:     if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(ctx, userID); err != nil {
526:         return profileResponse{}, err
527:     }
528: 
529:     var out profileResponse
530:     err := a.db.QueryRowContext(
531:         ctx,
532:         `SELECT id, email, COALESCE(display_name, '') FROM users WHERE id = ?`,
533:         userID,
534:     ).Scan(&out.User.ID, &out.User.Email, &out.User.DisplayName)
535:     if err != nil {
536:         return profileResponse{}, err
537:     }
538: 
539:     var sex sql.NullString
540:     var activity sql.NullString
541:     var goal sql.NullString
542:     err = a.db.QueryRowContext(
543:         ctx,
544:         `SELECT height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal FROM user_body_metrics WHERE user_id = ?`,
545:         userID,
546:     ).Scan(&out.Metrics.HeightCM, &out.Metrics.WeightKG, &out.Metrics.Age, &sex, &activity, &goal)
547:     if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
548:         return profileResponse{}, err
549:     }
550:     if sex.Valid {
551:         out.Metrics.Sex = &sex.String
552:     }
553:     if activity.Valid {
554:         out.Metrics.ActivityLevel = &activity.String
555:     }
556:     if goal.Valid {
557:         out.Metrics.Goal = &goal.String
558:     }
559: 
560:     var allergiesJSON string
561:     var dislikesJSON string
562:     var likesJSON string
563:     var notes sql.NullString
564:     err = a.db.QueryRowContext(
565:         ctx,
566:         `SELECT diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes
567:          FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = ?`,
568:         userID,
569:     ).Scan(&out.Preferences.DietType, &allergiesJSON, &dislikesJSON, &likesJSON, &out.Preferences.DailyCalorieTarget, &notes)
570:     if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
571:         return profileResponse{}, err
572:     }
573:     if out.Preferences.DietType == "" {
574:         out.Preferences.DietType = "omnivore"
575:     }
576:     _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(allergiesJSON), &out.Preferences.Allergies)
577:     _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(dislikesJSON), &out.Preferences.Dislikes)
578:     _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(likesJSON), &out.Preferences.Likes)
579:     if notes.Valid {
580:         out.Preferences.Notes = &notes.String
581:     }
582: 
583:     err = a.db.QueryRowContext(
584:         ctx,
585:         `SELECT month, currency, amount_cents
586:          FROM budgets
587:          WHERE user_id = ?
588:          ORDER BY month DESC
589:          LIMIT 1`,
590:         userID,
591:     ).Scan(&out.Budget.Month, &out.Budget.Currency, &out.Budget.AmountCents)
592:     if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
593:         out.Budget.Month = time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
594:         out.Budget.Currency = "USD"
595:         out.Budget.AmountCents = 0
596:         return out, nil
597:     }
598:     if err != nil {
599:         return profileResponse{}, err
600:     }
601:     return out, nil
602: }

619:          ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,

621:         userID,

623:         return err
624:     }
625:     return nil

636: func (a *app) authRequired(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
637:     return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
638:         authHeader := strings.TrimSpace(r.Header.Get("Authorization"))
639:         token := strings.TrimPrefix(authHeader, "Bearer ")
640:         if token == authHeader || token == "" {
641:             writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing bearer token")
642:             return
643:         }
644: 
645:         claims, err := a.parseToken(token)
646:         if err != nil {
647:             writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token")
648:             return
649:         }
650: 
651:         var exists int
652:         err = a.db.QueryRowContext(r.Context(), `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE id = ?`, claims.UserID).Scan(&exists)
653:         if err != nil || exists == 0 {
654:             writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token user")
655:             return
656:         }
657: 
658:         ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), userIDKey, claims.UserID)
659:         next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
660:     })
661: }
662: 
663: func (a *app) withCORS(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
664:     return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
665:         w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
666:         w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Authorization, Content-Type")
667:         w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS")
668:         if r.Method == http.MethodOptions {
669:             w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
670:             return
671:         }
672:         next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
673:     })
674: }
675: 
676: func (a *app) withLogging(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
677:     return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
678:         start := time.Now()
679:         next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
680:         log.Printf("%s %s (%s)", r.Method, r.URL.Path, time.Since(start).Round(time.Millisecond))
681:     })
682: }
683: 
684: func (a *app) makeToken(claims authClaims) (string, time.Time, error) {
685:     expiresAt := time.Now().UTC().Add(a.tokenTTL)
686:     claims.Exp = expiresAt.Unix()
687: 
688:     payload, err := json.Marshal(claims)
689:     if err != nil {
690:         return "", time.Time{}, err
691:     }
692: 
693:     payload64 := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(payload)
694:     mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
695:     if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(payload64)); err != nil {
696:         return "", time.Time{}, err
697:     }
698:     sig := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
699:     return payload64 + "." + sig, expiresAt, nil
700: }
701: 
702: func (a *app) parseToken(token string) (authClaims, error) {
703:     parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
704:     if len(parts) != 2 {
705:         return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token format")
706:     }
707: 
708:     mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
709:     if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(parts[0])); err != nil {
710:         return authClaims{}, err
711:     }
712:     expected := mac.Sum(nil)
713:     actual, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
714:     if err != nil {
715:         return authClaims{}, err
716:     }
717:     if !hmac.Equal(expected, actual) {
718:         return authClaims{}, errors.New("token signature mismatch")
719:     }
720: 
721:     payload, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[0])
722:     if err != nil {
723:         return authClaims{}, err
724:     }
725: 
726:     var claims authClaims
727:     if err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims); err != nil {
728:         return authClaims{}, err
729:     }
730:     if claims.UserID == "" || claims.Exp == 0 {
731:         return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token claims")
732:     }
733:     if time.Now().UTC().Unix() > claims.Exp {
734:         return authClaims{}, errors.New("token expired")
735:     }
736:     return claims, nil
737: }
738: 
739: func userIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) (string, bool) {
740:     v := ctx.Value(userIDKey)
741:     id, ok := v.(string)
742:     return id, ok
743: }
744: 
745: func readJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
746:     dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
747:     dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
748:     return dec.Decode(dst)
749: }
750: 
751: func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
752:     w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
753:     w.WriteHeader(status)
754:     _ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
755: }
756: 
757: func writeAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
758:     var out apiError
759:     out.Error.Code = code
760:     out.Error.Message = message
761:     writeJSON(w, status, out)
762: }
763: 
764: func newID(prefix string) (string, error) {
765:     b := make([]byte, 8)
766:     if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
767:         return "", err
768:     }
769:     return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
770: }
771: 
772: func mustID(prefix string) string {
773:     id, err := newID(prefix)
774:     if err != nil {
775:         panic(err)
776:     }
777:     return id
778: }
779: 
780: func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
781:     v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
782:     if v == "" {
783:         return fallback
784:     }
785:     return v
786: }

(End of file - total 786 lines)

-        ctx,
-        `SELECT month, currency, amount_cents
-         FROM budgets
-         WHERE user_id = ?
-         ORDER BY month DESC
-         LIMIT 1`,
-        userID,
-    ).Scan(&out.Budget.Month, &out.Budget.Currency, &out.Budget.AmountCents)
-    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
-        out.Budget.Month = time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
-        out.Budget.Currency = "USD"
-        out.Budget.AmountCents = 0
-        return out, nil
-    }
-    if err != nil {
-        return profileResponse{}, err
-    }
-    return out, nil
-}
-
-func (a *app) ensureDefaultProfileRows(ctx context.Context, userID string) error {
-    if _, err := a.db.ExecContext(
-        ctx,
-        `INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json)
-         VALUES (?, ?, 'omnivore', '[]', '[]', '[]')
-         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
-        mustID("upr"),
-        userID,
-    ); err != nil {
-        return err
-    }
-    if _, err := a.db.ExecContext(
-        ctx,
-        `INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id)
-         VALUES (?, ?)
-         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
-        mustID("ubm"),
-        userID,
-    ); err != nil {
-        return err
-    }
-    return nil
-}
-
-func (a *app) userExistsByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (bool, error) {
-    var n int
-    if err := a.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE email = ?`, email).Scan(&n); err != nil {
-        return false, err
-    }
-    return n > 0, nil
-}
-
-func (a *app) authRequired(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
-    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-        authHeader := strings.TrimSpace(r.Header.Get("Authorization"))
-        token := strings.TrimPrefix(authHeader, "Bearer ")
-        if token == authHeader || token == "" {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing bearer token")
-            return
-        }
-
-        claims, err := a.parseToken(token)
-        if err != nil {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token")
-            return
-        }
-
-        var exists int
-        err = a.db.QueryRowContext(r.Context(), `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE id = ?`, claims.UserID).Scan(&exists)
-        if err != nil || exists == 0 {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token user")
-            return
-        }
-
-        ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), userIDKey, claims.UserID)
-        next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
-    })
-}
-
-func (a *app) withCORS(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
-    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
-        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Authorization, Content-Type")
-        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS")
-        if r.Method == http.MethodOptions {
-            w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
-            return
-        }
-        next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
-    })
-}
-
-func (a *app) withLogging(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
-    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-        start := time.Now()
-        next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
-        log.Printf("%s %s (%s)", r.Method, r.URL.Path, time.Since(start).Round(time.Millisecond))
-    })
-}
-
-func (a *app) makeToken(claims authClaims) (string, time.Time, error) {
-    expiresAt := time.Now().UTC().Add(a.tokenTTL)
-    claims.Exp = expiresAt.Unix()
-
-    payload, err := json.Marshal(claims)
-    if err != nil {
-        return "", time.Time{}, err
-    }
-
-    payload64 := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(payload)
-    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
-    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(payload64)); err != nil {
-        return "", time.Time{}, err
-    }
-    sig := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
-    return payload64 + "." + sig, expiresAt, nil
-}
-
-func (a *app) parseToken(token string) (authClaims, error) {
-    parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
-    if len(parts) != 2 {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token format")
-    }
-
-    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
-    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(parts[0])); err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    expected := mac.Sum(nil)
-    actual, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
-    if err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    if !hmac.Equal(expected, actual) {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token signature mismatch")
-    }
-
-    payload, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[0])
-    if err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-
-    var claims authClaims
-    if err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims); err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    if claims.UserID == "" || claims.Exp == 0 {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token claims")
-    }
-    if time.Now().UTC().Unix() > claims.Exp {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token expired")
-    }
-    return claims, nil
-}
-
-func userIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) (string, bool) {
-    v := ctx.Value(userIDKey)
-    id, ok := v.(string)
-    return id, ok
-}
-
-func readJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
-    dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
-    dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
-    return dec.Decode(dst)
-}
-
-func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
-    w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
-    w.WriteHeader(status)
-    _ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
-}
-
-func writeAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
-    var out apiError
-    out.Error.Code = code
-    out.Error.Message = message
-    writeJSON(w, status, out)
-}
-
-func newID(prefix string) (string, error) {
-    b := make([]byte, 8)
-    if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
-        return "", err
-    }
-    return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
-}
-
-func mustID(prefix string) string {
-    id, err := newID(prefix)
-    if err != nil {
-        panic(err)
-    }
-    return id
-}
-
-func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
-    v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
-    if v == "" {
-        return fallback
-    }
-    return v
-}

files.patch:
Index: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/cmd/api/main.go
===================================================================
--- /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/cmd/api/main.go
+++ /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/cmd/api/main.go
@@ -1,786 +0,0 @@
-package main
-
-import (
-    "context"
-    "crypto/hmac"
-    "crypto/rand"
-    "crypto/sha256"
-    "database/sql"
-    "encoding/base64"
-    "encoding/hex"
-    "encoding/json"
-    "errors"
-    "fmt"
-    "log"
-    "net/http"
-    "os"
-    "strconv"
-    "strings"
-    "time"
-
-    "golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
-    _ "modernc.org/sqlite"
-)
-
-type app struct {
-    db          *sql.DB
-    tokenSecret []byte
-    tokenTTL    time.Duration
-}
-
-type apiError struct {
-    Error struct {
-        Code    string `json:"code"`
-        Message string `json:"message"`
-    } `json:"error"`
-}
-
-type userResponse struct {
-    ID          string `json:"id"`
-    Email       string `json:"email"`
-    DisplayName string `json:"displayName,omitempty"`
-}
-
-type authResponse struct {
-    Token     string       `json:"token"`
-    ExpiresAt string       `json:"expiresAt"`
-    User      userResponse `json:"user"`
-}
-
-type profileResponse struct {
-    User        userResponse      `json:"user"`
-    Metrics     profileMetricsOut `json:"metrics"`
-    Preferences profilePrefsOut   `json:"preferences"`
-    Budget      profileBudgetOut  `json:"budget"`
-}
-
-type profileMetricsOut struct {
-    HeightCM      *float64 `json:"heightCm"`
-    WeightKG      *float64 `json:"weightKg"`
-    Age           *int     `json:"age"`
-    Sex           *string  `json:"sex"`
-    ActivityLevel *string  `json:"activityLevel"`
-    Goal          *string  `json:"goal"`
-}
-
-type profilePrefsOut struct {
-    DietType           string   `json:"dietType"`
-    Allergies          []string `json:"allergies"`
-    Dislikes           []string `json:"dislikes"`
-    Likes              []string `json:"likes"`
-    DailyCalorieTarget *int     `json:"dailyCalorieTarget"`
-    Notes              *string  `json:"notes"`
-}
-
-type profileBudgetOut struct {
-    Month       string `json:"month"`
-    Currency    string `json:"currency"`
-    AmountCents int    `json:"amountCents"`
-}
-
-type authClaims struct {
-    UserID string `json:"uid"`
-    Exp    int64  `json:"exp"`
-}
-
-type key int
-
-const userIDKey key = 1
-
-func main() {
-    dbPath := envOr("DB_PATH", "../database/sqlite/pantrypal.db")
-    port := envOr("PORT", "8080")
-    tokenSecret := envOr("TOKEN_SECRET", "pantrypal-local-dev-secret")
-    tokenHours, err := strconv.Atoi(envOr("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS", "24"))
-    if err != nil || tokenHours < 1 {
-        log.Fatal("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS must be a positive integer")
-    }
-
-    db, err := sql.Open("sqlite", dbPath)
-    if err != nil {
-        log.Fatalf("open db: %v", err)
-    }
-    defer db.Close()
-
-    if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
-        log.Fatalf("ping db: %v", err)
-    }
-    if _, err := db.Exec("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;"); err != nil {
-        log.Fatalf("enable foreign keys: %v", err)
-    }
-
-    a := &app{
-        db:          db,
-        tokenSecret: []byte(tokenSecret),
-        tokenTTL:    time.Duration(tokenHours) * time.Hour,
-    }
-
-    mux := http.NewServeMux()
-    mux.HandleFunc("GET /health", a.handleHealth)
-    mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/register", a.handleRegister)
-    mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/login", a.handleLogin)
-    mux.Handle("GET /me", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handleMe)))
-    mux.Handle("GET /profile", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handleGetProfile)))
-    mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/metrics", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchMetrics)))
-    mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/preferences", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchPreferences)))
-    mux.Handle("PATCH /profile/budget", a.authRequired(http.HandlerFunc(a.handlePatchBudget)))
-
-    server := &http.Server{
-        Addr:              ":" + port,
-        Handler:           a.withCORS(a.withLogging(mux)),
-        ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
-    }
-
-    log.Printf("api listening on :%s using db %s", port, dbPath)
-    if err := server.ListenAndServe(); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
-        log.Fatal(err)
-    }
-}
-
-func (a *app) handleHealth(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
-}
-
-type registerRequest struct {
-    Email       string `json:"email"`
-    Password    string `json:"password"`
-    DisplayName string `json:"displayName"`
-}
-
-func (a *app) handleRegister(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    var req registerRequest
-    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
-        return
-    }
-    req.Email = strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(req.Email))
-    req.DisplayName = strings.TrimSpace(req.DisplayName)
-    if !strings.Contains(req.Email, "@") {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "email is invalid")
-        return
-    }
-    if len(req.Password) < 8 {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "password must be at least 8 characters")
-        return
-    }
-
-    exists, err := a.userExistsByEmail(r.Context(), req.Email)
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to check user")
-        return
-    }
-    if exists {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusConflict, "conflict", "email already registered")
-        return
-    }
-
-    hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(req.Password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to hash password")
-        return
-    }
-
-    userID, err := newID("usr")
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate user id")
-        return
-    }
-
-    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
-        r.Context(),
-        `INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`,
-        userID,
-        req.Email,
-        string(hash),
-        req.DisplayName,
-    )
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create user")
-        return
-    }
-
-    if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(r.Context(), userID); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to initialize profile")
-        return
-    }
-
-    token, expiresAt, err := a.makeToken(authClaims{UserID: userID})
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create token")
-        return
-    }
-
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, authResponse{
-        Token:     token,
-        ExpiresAt: expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339),
-        User: userResponse{
-            ID:          userID,
-            Email:       req.Email,
-            DisplayName: req.DisplayName,
-        },
-    })
-}
-
-type loginRequest struct {
-    Email    string `json:"email"`
-    Password string `json:"password"`
-}
-
-func (a *app) handleLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    var req loginRequest
-    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
-        return
-    }
-    req.Email = strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(req.Email))
-
-    var id string
-    var email string
-    var hash string
-    var displayName sql.NullString
-    err := a.db.QueryRowContext(
-        r.Context(),
-        `SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?`,
-        req.Email,
-    ).Scan(&id, &email, &hash, &displayName)
-    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid credentials")
-        return
-    }
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load user")
-        return
-    }
-    if bcrypt.CompareHashAndPassword([]byte(hash), []byte(req.Password)) != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid credentials")
-        return
-    }
-
-    if err := a.ensureDefaultProfileRows(r.Context(), id); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to initialize profile")
-        return
-    }
-
-    token, expiresAt, err := a.makeToken(authClaims{UserID: id})
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to create token")
-        return
-    }
-
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, authResponse{
-        Token:     token,
-        ExpiresAt: expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339),
-        User: userResponse{
-            ID:          id,
-            Email:       email,
-            DisplayName: displayName.String,
-        },
-    })
-}
-
-func (a *app) handleMe(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
-    if !ok {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
-        return
-    }
-
-    var user userResponse
-    err := a.db.QueryRowContext(
-        r.Context(),
-        `SELECT id, email, COALESCE(display_name, '') FROM users WHERE id = ?`,
-        userID,
-    ).Scan(&user.ID, &user.Email, &user.DisplayName)
-    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "user not found")
-        return
-    }
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load current user")
-        return
-    }
-
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]userResponse{"user": user})
-}
-
-func (a *app) handleGetProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
-    if !ok {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
-        return
-    }
-
-    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
-    if err != nil {
-        if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "not_found", "profile not found")
-            return
-        }
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
-        return
-    }
-
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
-}
-
-type patchMetricsRequest struct {
-    HeightCM      *float64 `json:"heightCm"`
-    WeightKG      *float64 `json:"weightKg"`
-    Age           *int     `json:"age"`
-    Sex           *string  `json:"sex"`
-    ActivityLevel *string  `json:"activityLevel"`
-    Goal          *string  `json:"goal"`
-}
-
-func (a *app) handlePatchMetrics(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
-    if !ok {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
-        return
-    }
-
-    var req patchMetricsRequest
-    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
-        return
-    }
-
-    rowID, err := newID("ubm")
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate metrics id")
-        return
-    }
-
-    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
-        r.Context(),
-        `INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id, height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal)
-         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
-         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
-             height_cm = excluded.height_cm,
-             weight_kg = excluded.weight_kg,
-             age = excluded.age,
-             sex = excluded.sex,
-             activity_level = excluded.activity_level,
-             goal = excluded.goal,
-             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
-        rowID,
-        userID,
-        req.HeightCM,
-        req.WeightKG,
-        req.Age,
-        req.Sex,
-        req.ActivityLevel,
-        req.Goal,
-    )
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "failed to update metrics")
-        return
-    }
-
-    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
-        return
-    }
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
-}
-
-type patchPreferencesRequest struct {
-    DietType           *string  `json:"dietType"`
-    Allergies          []string `json:"allergies"`
-    Dislikes           []string `json:"dislikes"`
-    Likes              []string `json:"likes"`
-    DailyCalorieTarget *int     `json:"dailyCalorieTarget"`
-    Notes              *string  `json:"notes"`
-}
-
-func (a *app) handlePatchPreferences(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
-    if !ok {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
-        return
-    }
-
-    var req patchPreferencesRequest
-    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
-        return
-    }
-
-    allergiesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Allergies)
-    dislikesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Dislikes)
-    likesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Likes)
-
-    dietType := "omnivore"
-    if req.DietType != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType) != "" {
-        dietType = strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType)
-    }
-
-    rowID, err := newID("upr")
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to generate preferences id")
-        return
-    }
-
-    _, err = a.db.ExecContext(
-        r.Context(),
-        `INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes)
-         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
-         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
-             diet_type = excluded.diet_type,
-             allergies_json = excluded.allergies_json,
-             dislikes_json = excluded.dislikes_json,
-             likes_json = excluded.likes_json,
-             daily_calorie_target = excluded.daily_calorie_target,
-             notes = excluded.notes,
-             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
-        rowID,
-        userID,
-        dietType,
-        string(allergiesJSON),
-        string(dislikesJSON),
-        string(likesJSON),
-        req.DailyCalorieTarget,
-        req.Notes,
-    )
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "failed to update preferences")
-        return
-    }
-
-    profile, err := a.loadProfile(r.Context(), userID)
-    if err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", "failed to load profile")
-        return
-    }
-    writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, profile)
-}
-
-type patchBudgetRequest struct {
-    Month       *string `json:"month"`
-    Currency    *string `json:"currency"`
-    AmountCents *int    `json:"amountCents"`
-}
-
-func (a *app) handlePatchBudget(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-    userID, ok := userIDFromContext(r.Context())
-    if !ok {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing auth context")
-        return
-    }
-
-    var req patchBudgetRequest
-    if err := readJSON(r, &req); err != nil {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", "invalid JSON payload")
-        return
-    }
-    if req.AmountCents == nil || *req.AmountCents < 0 {
-        writeAPIError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "validation_error", "amountCents is required and must be >= 0")
-        return
-    }
-
-    month := time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")

-func (a *app) loadProfile(ctx context.Context, userID string) (profileResponse, error) {

-func (a *app) authRequired(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
-    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-        authHeader := strings.TrimSpace(r.Header.Get("Authorization"))
-        token := strings.TrimPrefix(authHeader, "Bearer ")
-        if token == authHeader || token == "" {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "missing bearer token")
-            return
-        }
-
-        claims, err := a.parseToken(token)
-        if err != nil {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token")
-            return
-        }
-
-        var exists int
-        err = a.db.QueryRowContext(r.Context(), `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE id = ?`, claims.UserID).Scan(&exists)
-        if err != nil || exists == 0 {
-            writeAPIError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized", "invalid token user")
-            return
-        }
-
-        ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), userIDKey, claims.UserID)
-        next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
-    })
-}
-
-func (a *app) withCORS(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
-    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
-        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Authorization, Content-Type")
-        w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS")
-        if r.Method == http.MethodOptions {
-            w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
-            return
-        }
-        next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
-    })

-func (a *app) withLogging(next http.Handler) http.Handler {

-        log.Printf("%s %s (%s)", r.Method, r.URL.Path, time.Since(start).Round(time.Millisecond))
-    })
-}
-
-func (a *app) makeToken(claims authClaims) (string, time.Time, error) {
-    expiresAt := time.Now().UTC().Add(a.tokenTTL)
-    claims.Exp = expiresAt.Unix()
-
-    payload, err := json.Marshal(claims)
-    if err != nil {
-        return "", time.Time{}, err
-    }
-
-    payload64 := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(payload)
-    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
-    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(payload64)); err != nil {
-        return "", time.Time{}, err
-    }
-    sig := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
-    return payload64 + "." + sig, expiresAt, nil
-}
-
-func (a *app) parseToken(token string) (authClaims, error) {
-    parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
-    if len(parts) != 2 {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token format")
-    }
-
-    mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, a.tokenSecret)
-    if _, err := mac.Write([]byte(parts[0])); err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    expected := mac.Sum(nil)
-    actual, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
-    if err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    if !hmac.Equal(expected, actual) {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token signature mismatch")
-    }
-
-    payload, err := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[0])
-    if err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-
-    var claims authClaims
-    if err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims); err != nil {
-        return authClaims{}, err
-    }
-    if claims.UserID == "" || claims.Exp == 0 {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("invalid token claims")
-    }
-    if time.Now().UTC().Unix() > claims.Exp {
-        return authClaims{}, errors.New("token expired")
-    }
-    return claims, nil
-}
-
-func userIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) (string, bool) {
-    v := ctx.Value(userIDKey)
-    id, ok := v.(string)
-    return id, ok
-}
-
-func readJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
-    dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
-    dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
-    return dec.Decode(dst)
-}
-
-func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
-    w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
-    w.WriteHeader(status)
-    _ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
-}
-
-func writeAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
-    var out apiError
-    out.Error.Code = code
-    out.Error.Message = message
-    writeJSON(w, status, out)
-}
-
-func newID(prefix string) (string, error) {
-    b := make([]byte, 8)
-    if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
-        return "", err
-    }
-    return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
-}
-
-func mustID(prefix string) string {
-    id, err := newID(prefix)
-    if err != nil {
-        panic(err)
-    }
-    return id
-}
-
-func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
-    v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
-    if v == "" {
-        return fallback
-    }
-    return v
-}

*** Add File: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/internal/config/config.go
+package config
+
+import (
+    "os"
+    "strconv"
+    "strings"
+    "time"
+)
+
+type Config struct {
+    Port        string
+    DBPath      string
+    TokenSecret string
+    TokenTTL    time.Duration
+}
+
+func Load() (Config, error) {
+    tokenHours, err := strconv.Atoi(envOr("TOKEN_TTL_HOURS", "24"))
+    if err != nil || tokenHours < 1 {
+        return Config{}, err
+    }
+
+    return Config{
+        Port:        envOr("PORT", "8080"),
+        DBPath:      envOr("DB_PATH", "../database/sqlite/pantrypal.db"),
+        TokenSecret: envOr("TOKEN_SECRET", "pantrypal-local-dev-secret"),
+        TokenTTL:    time.Duration(tokenHours) * time.Hour,
+    }, nil
+}
+
+func envOr(name, fallback string) string {
+    v := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(name))
+    if v == "" {
+        return fallback
+    }
+    return v
+}
*** End Patch

+++ /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/internal/platform/db/sqlite.go
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package db
+
+import (
+    "database/sql"
+
+    _ "modernc.org/sqlite"
+)
+
+func Open(path string) (*sql.DB, error) {
+    conn, err := sql.Open("sqlite", path)
+    if err != nil {
+        return nil, err
+    }
+    if err := conn.Ping(); err != nil {
+        conn.Close()
+        return nil, err
+    }
+    if _, err := conn.Exec("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;"); err != nil {
+        conn.Close()
+        return nil, err
+    }
+    return conn, nil
+}

+package handlers
+
+import (
+    "encoding/json"
+    "net/http"
+
+    "pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/dto"
+)
+
+func ReadJSON(r *http.Request, dst any) error {
+    dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
+    dec.DisallowUnknownFields()
+    return dec.Decode(dst)
+}
+
+func WriteJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
+    w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+    w.WriteHeader(status)
+    _ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
+}
+
+func WriteAPIError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, code, message string) {
+    var out dto.APIError
+    out.Error.Code = code
+    out.Error.Message = message
+    WriteJSON(w, status, out)
+}
*** End Patch

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package id
+
+import (
+    "crypto/rand"
+    "encoding/hex"
+    "fmt"
+)
+
+func New(prefix string) (string, error) {
+    b := make([]byte, 8)
+    if _, err := rand.Read(b); err != nil {
+        return "", err
+    }
+    return fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", prefix, hex.EncodeToString(b)), nil
+}
+
+func Must(prefix string) string {
+    v, err := New(prefix)
+    if err != nil {
+        panic(err)
+    }
+    return v
+}

input.patchText:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/internal/repositories/user_repository.go
+package repositories
+
+import (
+    "context"
+    "database/sql"
+    "encoding/json"
+    "errors"
+    "strings"
+    "time"
+
+    "pantrypal/backend/internal/platform/id"
+    "pantrypal/backend/internal/transport/http/dto"
+)
+
+type User struct {
+    ID           string
+    Email        string
+    PasswordHash string
+    DisplayName  string
+}
+
+type UserRepository struct {
+    db *sql.DB
+}
+
+func NewUserRepository(db *sql.DB) *UserRepository {
+    return &UserRepository{db: db}
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) ExistsByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (bool, error) {
+    var n int
+    if err := r.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE email = ?`, email).Scan(&n); err != nil {
+        return false, err
+    }
+    return n > 0, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) CreateUser(ctx context.Context, email, passwordHash, displayName string) (User, error) {
+    userID, err := id.New("usr")
+    if err != nil {
+        return User{}, err
+    }
+
+    _, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+        userID,
+        email,
+        passwordHash,
+        displayName,
+    )
+    if err != nil {
+        return User{}, err
+    }
+
+    if err := r.EnsureDefaultProfileRows(ctx, userID); err != nil {
+        return User{}, err
+    }
+
+    return User{ID: userID, Email: email, DisplayName: displayName}, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) GetByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (User, error) {
+    var out User
+    var displayName sql.NullString
+    err := r.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?`,
+        email,
+    ).Scan(&out.ID, &out.Email, &out.PasswordHash, &displayName)
+    if err != nil {
+        return User{}, err
+    }
+    if displayName.Valid {
+        out.DisplayName = displayName.String
+    }
+    return out, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, userID string) (User, error) {
+    var out User
+    err := r.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT id, email, COALESCE(display_name, '') FROM users WHERE id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.ID, &out.Email, &out.DisplayName)
+    if err != nil {
+        return User{}, err
+    }
+    return out, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) ExistsByID(ctx context.Context, userID string) (bool, error) {
+    var n int
+    if err := r.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE id = ?`, userID).Scan(&n); err != nil {
+        return false, err
+    }
+    return n > 0, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) EnsureDefaultProfileRows(ctx context.Context, userID string) error {
+    if _, err := r.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json)
+         VALUES (?, ?, 'omnivore', '[]', '[]', '[]')
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
+        id.Must("upr"),
+        userID,
+    ); err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+    if _, err := r.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id)
+         VALUES (?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO NOTHING`,
+        id.Must("ubm"),
+        userID,
+    ); err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+    return nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) GetProfile(ctx context.Context, userID string) (dto.ProfileResponse, error) {
+    if err := r.EnsureDefaultProfileRows(ctx, userID); err != nil {
+        return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+    }
+
+    user, err := r.GetByID(ctx, userID)
+    if err != nil {
+        return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+    }
+
+    out := dto.ProfileResponse{
+        User: dto.UserResponse{
+            ID:          user.ID,
+            Email:       user.Email,
+            DisplayName: user.DisplayName,
+        },
+    }
+
+    var sex sql.NullString
+    var activity sql.NullString
+    var goal sql.NullString
+    err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal FROM user_body_metrics WHERE user_id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Metrics.HeightCM, &out.Metrics.WeightKG, &out.Metrics.Age, &sex, &activity, &goal)
+    if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+    }
+    if sex.Valid {
+        out.Metrics.Sex = &sex.String
+    }
+    if activity.Valid {
+        out.Metrics.ActivityLevel = &activity.String
+    }
+    if goal.Valid {
+        out.Metrics.Goal = &goal.String
+    }
+
+    var allergiesJSON string
+    var dislikesJSON string
+    var likesJSON string
+    var notes sql.NullString
+    err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes
+         FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = ?`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Preferences.DietType, &allergiesJSON, &dislikesJSON, &likesJSON, &out.Preferences.DailyCalorieTarget, &notes)
+    if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+    }
+    if out.Preferences.DietType == "" {
+        out.Preferences.DietType = "omnivore"
+    }
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(allergiesJSON), &out.Preferences.Allergies)
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(dislikesJSON), &out.Preferences.Dislikes)
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(likesJSON), &out.Preferences.Likes)
+    if notes.Valid {
+        out.Preferences.Notes = &notes.String
+    }
+
+    err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,
+        `SELECT month, currency, amount_cents FROM budgets WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1`,
+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Budget.Month, &out.Budget.Currency, &out.Budget.AmountCents)
+    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
+        out.Budget.Month = time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
+        out.Budget.Currency = "USD"
+        out.Budget.AmountCents = 0
+        return out, nil
+    }
+    if err != nil {
+        return dto.ProfileResponse{}, err
+    }
+    return out, nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertMetrics(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchMetricsRequest) error {
+    rowID, err := id.New("ubm")
+    if err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+    _, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO user_body_metrics (id, user_id, height_cm, weight_kg, age, sex, activity_level, goal)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
+             height_cm = excluded.height_cm,
+             weight_kg = excluded.weight_kg,
+             age = excluded.age,
+             sex = excluded.sex,
+             activity_level = excluded.activity_level,
+             goal = excluded.goal,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+        rowID,
+        userID,
+        req.HeightCM,
+        req.WeightKG,
+        req.Age,
+        req.Sex,
+        req.ActivityLevel,
+        req.Goal,
+    )
+    return err
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertPreferences(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchPreferencesRequest) error {
+    rowID, err := id.New("upr")
+    if err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+    allergiesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Allergies)
+    dislikesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Dislikes)
+    likesJSON, _ := json.Marshal(req.Likes)
+
+    dietType := "omnivore"
+    if req.DietType != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType) != "" {
+        dietType = strings.TrimSpace(*req.DietType)
+    }
+
+    _, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO user_preferences (id, user_id, diet_type, allergies_json, dislikes_json, likes_json, daily_calorie_target, notes)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
+             diet_type = excluded.diet_type,
+             allergies_json = excluded.allergies_json,
+             dislikes_json = excluded.dislikes_json,
+             likes_json = excluded.likes_json,
+             daily_calorie_target = excluded.daily_calorie_target,
+             notes = excluded.notes,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+        rowID,
+        userID,
+        dietType,
+        string(allergiesJSON),
+        string(dislikesJSON),
+        string(likesJSON),
+        req.DailyCalorieTarget,
+        req.Notes,
+    )
+    return err
+}
+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertBudget(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchBudgetRequest) error {
+    rowID, err := id.New("bdg")
+    if err != nil {
+        return err
+    }
+
+    month := time.Now().UTC().Format("2006-01")
+    if req.Month != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month) != "" {
+        month = strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month)
+    }
+    currency := "USD"
+    if req.Currency != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Currency) != "" {
+        currency = strings.ToUpper(strings.TrimSpace(*req.Currency))
+    }
+
+    _, err = r.db.ExecContext(
+        ctx,
+        `INSERT INTO budgets (id, user_id, month, currency, amount_cents)
+         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
+         ON CONFLICT(user_id, month) DO UPDATE SET
+             currency = excluded.currency,
+             amount_cents = excluded.amount_cents,
+             updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
+        rowID,
+        userID,
+        month,
+        currency,
+        *req.AmountCents,
+    )
+    return err
+}
*** End Patch

+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(allergiesJSON), &out.Preferences.Allergies)
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(dislikesJSON), &out.Preferences.Dislikes)
+    _ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(likesJSON), &out.Preferences.Likes)
+    if notes.Valid {

+    }
+
+    err = r.db.QueryRowContext(
+        ctx,

+        userID,
+    ).Scan(&out.Budget.Month, &out.Budget.Currency, &out.Budget.AmountCents)
+    if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {

+
+func (r *UserRepository) UpsertPreferences(ctx context.Context, userID string, req dto.PatchPreferencesRequest) error {
+    rowID, err := id.New("upr")

+        return err
+    }
+

+    if req.Month != nil && strings.TrimSpace(*req.Month) != "" {

Index: /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/internal/repositories/user_repository.go

--- /root/Panathenaia/pantryPal/backend/internal/repositories/user_repository.go
